webhooks.signatureDescription: Kila uwasilishaji unajumuisha kichwa cha Saini cha X-Webhook kilichotiwa saini na HMAC-SHA256 kwa kutumia siri ya webhook. Thibitisha saini kabla ya kuamini mzigo wa malipo.

wizard.step1Desc: Teua mfumo lengwa wa muunganisho wa webhook hii.

howItWorks.step1: Chagua mtoa huduma wa muunganisho (k.m. Slack, Discord, webhook maalum) na usanidi maelezo ya muunganisho.
howItWorks.step2: Sanidi matukio ya mfumo ya kujiandikisha kwayo (k.m. hitilafu za ukamilishaji, ubadilishaji wa modeli, au vikomo vya matumizi).
howItWorks.step3: Thibitisha usanidi kwa kutuma payload ya jaribio ili kuhakikisha kituo lengwa kinapokea.
howItWorks.step4: Linda kituo chako lengwa kwa kuhalalisha kichwa cha X-Webhook-Signature HMAC-SHA256 kwa kutumia siri ya webhook.
howItWorks.title: Jinsi Webhooks Zinavyofanya Kazi
howItWorks.customOnly: Inatumika tu kwa miunganisho ya vituo lengwa maalum.
howItWorks.hmacRecipe: Ili kuthibitisha payload za webhook katika Node.js, kokotoa HMAC-SHA256 ya mwili ghafi wa ombi kwa kutumia ufunguo wako wa siri. Linganisha na kichwa cha X-Webhook-Signature kwa kutumia timingSafeEqual.
howItWorks.timeoutNote: Uwasilishaji wa Webhook una kikomo cha muda cha sekunde 10.
howItWorks.retryNote: Uwasilishaji uliofeli hujaribiwa tena hadi mara 5 kwa kutumia mfumo wa kurudi nyuma wa kipeo (exponential backoff).
howItWorks.docsLink: Soma mwongozo mzima wa msanidi wa Webhooks
howItWorks.hmacRecipePython: Uthibitishaji wa HMAC wa Python: hmac.new(secret, body, hashlib.sha256).hexdigest()
howItWorks.hmacRecipeBash: Uthibitishaji wa HMAC wa Bash: echo -n "$body" | openssl dgst -sha256 -hmac "$secret"

toolUseCases.claude: Use when you want strong planning workflows and long multi-file refactors with Claude Code.

toolUseCases.droid: Use when you need a lightweight terminal agent focused on fast coding and command execution loops.
toolUseCases.openclaw: Use when you want an Open Claw style coding agent but routed through OmniRoute policies.
toolUseCases.cline: Use when you configure coding agents inside editors and want guided setup with OmniRoute models.
toolUseCases.kilo: Use when your workflow depends on Kilo Code commands and fast iterative edits.
toolUseCases.cursor: Use when coding in Cursor and you need custom OpenAI-compatible models through OmniRoute.
toolUseCases.continue: Use when running Continue in IDEs and you need portable JSON-based provider configuration.
toolUseCases.opencode: Use when you prefer terminal-native agent runs and scripted automation via OpenCode.
toolUseCases.kiro: Use when integrating Kiro and controlling model routing centrally from OmniRoute.
toolUseCases.windsurf: Use when you want an AI-first IDE with Codeium/Windsurf models routed through OmniRoute.
toolUseCases.antigravity: Use when Antigravity/Kiro traffic must be intercepted through MITM and routed to OmniRoute.
toolUseCases.copilot: Use when you want Copilot chat style UX while enforcing OmniRoute keys and routing rules.
toolUseCases.amp: Use when you want Amp shorthand workflows but still need OmniRoute alias and routing rules enforcement.
toolUseCases.qwen: Use when you need Alibaba Qwen Code CLI for coding tasks.
toolUseCases.hermes: Use when you need a lightweight terminal-native AI assistant for quick tasks.

combos.title: Combos
combos.description: Create model combos with weighted routing and fallback support
combos.autoCatalogDescription: Michanganyiko ya kiotomatiki/* iliyojengewa ndani imetatuliwa kutoka kwa watoa huduma waliounganishwa. Tumia kitambulisho chochote kati ya hivi kama sehemu ya kielelezo - hakuna usanidi unaohitajika.
combos.comboDescriptionPlaceholder: Dokezo la hiari linalofafanua mchanganyiko huu
combos.priorityDesc: Sequential fallback: tries model 1 first, then 2, etc.
combos.weightedDesc: Distributes traffic by weight percentage with fallback
combos.roundRobinDesc: Circular distribution: each request goes to the next model in rotation
combos.contextRelayDesc: Preserves session continuity with handoff summaries when accounts rotate
combos.randomDesc: Uniform random selection, then fallback to remaining models
combos.leastUsedDesc: Picks the model with fewest requests, balancing load over time
combos.costOptimizedDesc: Routes to the cheapest model first based on pricing
combos.resetAwareDesc: Husawazisha mgawo uliosalia dhidi ya saa 5 na uwekaji upya wa kila wiki, kisha uwekaji alama sawa
combos.strictRandomDesc: Shuffle deck — uses each model once before reshuffling
combos.fusionDesc: Husambaza prompt kwa kila modeli ya paneli kwa sambamba, kisha modeli mwamuzi huunganisha jibu moja la mwisho
combos.fusionJudgeModelHelp: Modeli inayounganisha majibu ya paneli kuwa jibu moja la mwisho. Acha wazi ili kutumia modeli ya kwanza ya paneli.
combos.fusionMinPanelHelp: Majibu ya paneli yaliyofanikiwa yanayohitajika kabla ya modeli zinazochelewa kupata muda wa ziada wa neema (chaguo-msingi 2).
combos.fusionStragglerGraceMs: Muda wa neema kwa modeli zinazochelewa (ms)
combos.fusionStragglerGraceMsHelp: Muda wa kusubiri modeli za paneli zilizo polepole mara tu akidi inapofikiwa (chaguo-msingi 8000).
combos.fusionPanelHardTimeoutMs: Muda mkali wa mwisho wa paneli (ms)
combos.fusionPanelHardTimeoutMsHelp: Kikomo kabisa ili modeli moja iliyokwama isikwamishe paneli nzima (chaguo-msingi 90000).
combos.contextRelayHandoffThresholdHelp: When quota usage reaches this threshold, OmniRoute generates a structured handoff summary before the active account is exhausted.
combos.contextRelayMaxMessagesHelp: Limits how much recent history is condensed into the relay summary.
combos.contextRelaySummaryModelHelp: Optional override model used only for generating the handoff summary. Leave empty to reuse the active combo model.
combos.contextRelayProviderNote: Context Relay currently generates handoffs for Codex account rotation. Pair it with multiple accounts of the same provider for the best continuity.
combos.advancedHint: Leave empty to use global defaults. These override per-provider settings.
combos.maxSetRetries: Kiwango cha Juu cha Kujaribu tena
combos.liveFleetDataHint: Data ya kundi hufika kupitia matukio ya moja kwa moja ya combo.
combos.liveDataHint: Data ya moja kwa moja hufika kupitia chaneli ya combo ya WebSocket.
combos.liveDisconnected: Moja kwa moja imezimwa — WebSocket imekatika. Inaonyesha hali ya mwisho inayojulikana.

combos.playgroundDescription: Iga jinsi maombi yatakavyoelekezwa kupitia combo zako
combos.playgroundEmptyHint: Chagua combo na ubofye Iga Njia ili kuona njia ya uelekezaji.

priority.when: You have one preferred model and only want fallback on failure.
priority.avoid: You need request distribution across models.
priority.example: Primary coding model with cheaper backup for outages.

weighted.when: You need controlled traffic split across models.
weighted.avoid: You cannot maintain accurate weights over time.

round-robin.when: You want predictable and even distribution.
round-robin.avoid: Models differ too much in latency or cost.
round-robin.example: Same model on multiple accounts to spread throughput.

random.when: You want simple distribution with minimal setup.

least-used.when: You want adaptive balancing based on live demand.
least-used.avoid: Traffic is too low to benefit from usage balancing.
least-used.example: Mixed workloads where one model often gets overloaded.

cost-optimized.when: Cost reduction is your top priority.
cost-optimized.avoid: Pricing data is missing or outdated.
cost-optimized.example: Background or batch jobs where lower cost is preferred.

reset-aware.when: Unapitia akaunti nyingi ukitumia telemetry ya kiasi na madirisha tofauti ya kuweka upya.
reset-aware.avoid: Kiwango cha telemetry hakipatikani kwa akaunti nyingi.
reset-aware.example: Pendelea 60% ya kila wiki ya kuweka upya akaunti kesho juu ya 80% ya kuweka upya akaunti baadaye.

strict-random.when: Use when you want perfectly even spread — each model used once before repeating.
strict-random.avoid: Avoid when models have different quality or latency and order matters.
strict-random.example: Example: Multiple accounts of the same model to distribute usage evenly.

p2c.when: Use when you want low-latency selection using Power-of-Two-Choices algorithm.
p2c.avoid: Avoid for small combos with 2 or fewer models — no benefit over round-robin.
p2c.example: Example: High-throughput inference across 4+ equivalent model endpoints.

context-relay.when: Use when long sessions must survive account rotation without losing the working context.
context-relay.avoid: Avoid when account switching is rare or when you do not want extra summarization requests.
context-relay.example: Example: Codex sessions that rotate across multiple accounts near quota exhaustion.

fill-first.when: Use when you want to fully exhaust one provider's quota before moving to the next.
fill-first.avoid: Avoid when you need request-level load balancing across providers.
fill-first.example: Example: Use all $200 Deepgram credits before falling back to Groq.

auto.when: Use when you need multi-factor scoring routing based on cost, latency, and quality.
auto.avoid: Avoid when you need strict priority ordering or historical persistence.
auto.example: Example: Balance requests across models with different strengths.

lkgp.when: Use when you want to route based on historical success rates and performance.
lkgp.avoid: Avoid when historical data is limited or unreliable.
lkgp.example: Example: Route to models with a good track record on specific tasks.

context-optimized.when: Use when you need to optimize context window usage across models.
context-optimized.avoid: Avoid when models have similar context lengths or tasks are simple.
context-optimized.example: Example: Distribute long conversations across models with larger context windows.

advancedHelp.maxRetries: How many retries are attempted before failing a request.
advancedHelp.retryDelay: Initial wait between retries. Higher values reduce burst pressure.
advancedHelp.healthcheck: Skips unhealthy models/providers from routing decisions.
advancedHelp.concurrencyPerModel: Max simultaneous requests allowed per model in round-robin.
advancedHelp.queueTimeout: How long a request can wait in queue before timing out.
advancedHelp.failoverBeforeRetry: Inapowashwa, hitilafu yoyote ya mkondo wa juu husababisha kushindwa mara moja kwa shabaha ya mseto inayofuata, kuruka majaribio yote na URL mbadala.
advancedHelp.maxSetRetries: Idadi ya mara za kujaribu tena lengo kamili lililowekwa wakati kila lengo limeshindwa. 0 = hakuna kiwango cha kuweka tena.

priority.title: Fail-safe baseline
priority.description: Use one primary model and keep fallback chain short and reliable.
priority.tip1: Put your most reliable model first.
priority.tip2: Keep 1-2 backup models with similar quality.
priority.tip3: Use safe retries to absorb transient provider failures.

weighted.title: Controlled traffic split
weighted.description: Great for canary rollouts and gradual migration between models.
weighted.tip2: Keep the total at 100% and auto-balance after changes.
weighted.tip3: Monitor success and latency before increasing canary weight.

round-robin.title: Predictable load sharing
round-robin.description: Best when models are equivalent and you need smooth distribution.
round-robin.tip2: Set concurrency limits to avoid burst overload.
round-robin.tip3: Use queue timeout to fail fast under saturation.

random.title: Quick spread with low setup
random.description: Use when you need simple distribution without strict guarantees.
random.tip1: Use models with similar latency profiles.
random.tip2: Keep retries enabled to absorb random misses.
random.tip3: Prefer this for experimentation, not strict SLAs.

least-used.title: Adaptive balancing
least-used.description: Routes to less-used models to reduce hotspots over time.
least-used.tip2: Combine with health checks for safer balancing.
least-used.tip3: Track per-model usage to validate distribution gains.

cost-optimized.title: Budget-first routing
cost-optimized.description: Routes to lower-cost models when pricing metadata is available.
cost-optimized.tip1: Ensure pricing coverage for all selected models.
cost-optimized.tip2: Keep a quality fallback for hard prompts.
cost-optimized.tip3: Use for batch/background jobs where cost is the main KPI.

reset-aware.title: Weka upya-kufahamu mzunguko wa akaunti
reset-aware.description: Husawazisha mgao uliosalia wa mtoa huduma dhidi ya kuweka upya muda.
reset-aware.tip1: Tumia hatua za akaunti wazi au uelekezaji wa lebo ya akaunti kwa watoa huduma walio na kiwango cha telemetry.
reset-aware.tip2: Rejesha kipindi dhidi ya uzani wa kila wiki wakati uchovu wa muda mfupi ni hatari zaidi.
reset-aware.tip3: Weka bendi ndogo ili akaunti zinazolingana bado zizunguke kwa usawa.

strict-random.title: Shuffle deck distribution
strict-random.description: Each model is used exactly once per cycle before reshuffling.
strict-random.tip1: Use at least 2 models for meaningful distribution.
strict-random.tip3: Ideal for load balancing across multiple API accounts.

fill-first.description: Exhaust provider quotas sequentially before falling back.
fill-first.tip1: Use for quota-based routing with clear fallback chains.
fill-first.tip2: Set quotas accurately to avoid premature fallback.
fill-first.tip3: Works best with providers offering free tiers or credit buckets.
fill-first.title: Quota Exhaustion

auto.description: Route based on real-time scoring for cost, latency, quality, and health.
auto.tip1: Let the engine balance multiple factors automatically.
auto.tip2: Monitor which factors drive routing decisions in logs.
auto.tip3: Use for complex workloads where no single factor dominates.
auto.title: Multi-Factor Optimization

lkgp.description: Route based on historical performance and success patterns.
lkgp.tip1: Requires sufficient request history for accurate predictions.
lkgp.tip2: Good for workloads with consistent model performance patterns.
lkgp.tip3: Monitor prediction accuracy and adjust weights as needed.
lkgp.title: History-Based Routing

context-optimized.description: Optimize routing based on context window usage and token efficiency.
context-optimized.tip1: Route long conversations to models with larger context windows.
context-optimized.tip2: Monitor context utilization to avoid token waste.
context-optimized.tip3: Best for conversational AI requiring extensive context retention.
context-optimized.title: Context Optimization

context-relay.description: Best when account rotation is expected and the next account must inherit a simplified task summary.
context-relay.tip1: Use with providers rotating accounts for the same model family.
context-relay.tip2: Set handoff threshold below hard quota cutoffs for summary generation time.
context-relay.tip3: Only set a dedicated summary model if the primary is too expensive or unstable.
context-relay.title: Session Continuity Priority

p2c.description: Route to the provider with the lowest current load based on real-time metrics.
p2c.tip1: Monitor provider health metrics for accurate load assessment.
p2c.tip2: Works best with homogeneous provider pools.
p2c.tip3: Adjust sensitivity to avoid oscillation during traffic spikes.
p2c.title: Power of Two Choices

concept.title: Kumbukumbu ya Mazungumzo
concept.description: OmniRoute hujifunza kutoka kwa kila mazungumzo, ikikumbuka ukweli, vipindi, taratibu, na dhana za kisemantiki zinazofanya majibu kuwa sahihi zaidi na yenye kuzingatia muktadha.
concept.howWorksContent:
1. Uchunguzi wa kiotomatiki: mwishoni mwa kila jibu, ukweli na vipindi hugunduliwa na kuhifadhiwa kiotomatiki.
2. Urejeshaji: kabla ya kila jibu, kumbukumbu muhimu zaidi hutafutwa kupitia FTS5 (halisi), vekta (kisemantiki), au RRF mseto.
3. Uingizaji: kumbukumbu zinazofaa huingizwa kwenye muktadha wa msaidizi ili kuboresha ubora wa jibu.
4. Usimamizi: tumia ukurasa huu kutazama, kuhariri, kuuza nje, na kufinyaza kumbukumbu za zamani.

providers.compatUpstreamHeadersHint: High-privilege setting — same trust level as editing provider API credentials; only trusted admins should use it. Merged after OmniRoute adds auth from the provider API key. If a custom header uses the same name as an existing one (e.g. Authorization), your value fully replaces the auto-generated header (including the Bearer token) — the upstream only sees what you typed, not the key from settings. Misconfiguration can cause 401 or broken upstream auth. One row per header (e.g. extra Authentication for some gateways). Hover or focus the value to preview. Saves on blur, outside click, or closing this panel.

providers.zedImportDescription: Gundua vitambulisho vya mtoa huduma wa AI (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral, xAI) vilivyohifadhiwa na Zed IDE kwenye keychain ya OS na uviingize kama viunganisho. Zed IDE lazima iwe imesakinishwa kwenye mashine hii.
providers.zedImportSuccess: Imetuma kitambulisho/vitambulisho {credentials} kutoka Zed kwa mtoa huduma/matoleo {providers}
providers.zedNoCredentials: Hakuna vitambulisho vya Zed vilivyopatikana kwenye keychain
providers.zedUnsupportedCredentials: Imepata vitambulisho vya keychain {count}, lakini hakuna vilivyolingana na watoa huduma wanaoungwa mkono
providers.zedManualDescription: Tumia hii wakati OmniRoute inapoendeshwa kwenye Docker au keychain haipatikani. Bandika ufunguo wa API ambao Zed ilihifadhi chini ya <path>~/.config/zed/settings.json</path>, au unakili kutoka kwenye jopo la mipangilio la Zed AI.
providers.zedManualImportSuccess: Imeingiza tokeni ya {provider} kutoka kwa Zed
providers.grokImportDescription: Ingiza faili yako ya Grok Build <authPath>~/.grok/auth.json</authPath>. Unaweza kuipata kwa kuendesha <command>grok login</command> kwenye terminal yako.
providers.grokInvalidAuth: Hii si faili halali ya auth.json ya Grok Build. Inatarajiwa kuwa na kitu chenye ufunguo ulio na JWT.
providers.grokImportFailed: Imeshindwa kuingiza uthibitisho wa Grok Build
providers.grokImportSuccess: Muunganisho wa Grok Build umeiingizwa kwa mafanikio
providers.grokValidToken: Tokeni halali ya Grok Build imegunduliwa
providers.grokRefreshIncluded: Tokeni ya kuonyesha upya imejumuishwa — usasishaji wa kiotomatiki wa tokeni umewezeshwa
providers.grokRefreshMissing: Hakuna tokeni ya kuonyesha upya iliyopatikana — ingiza tena baada ya tokeni kuisha muda wake
providers.freeTierProviders: Watoa Huduma za Kiwango cha Bure
providers.freeTierProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma walio na viwango vya bure - wengine wanahitaji kujisajili kwa ufunguo wa API, wengine hawahitaji kitambulisho hata kidogo.
providers.ideProvidersDesc: Wahariri walio na usajili wa ndani wa AI. Tumia ukurasa wa mtoa huduma kuleta vitambulisho moja kwa moja kutoka kwa msururu wa vitufe wa IDE.
providers.noIdeProviders: Hakuna watoa huduma wa IDE wanaolingana na vichujio vya sasa.
providers.providerDetailFastTierTooltip: Tumia kiwango cha haraka cha Codex kwa miunganisho yote ya Codex kwa chaguo-msingi
providers.providerDetailValidClaudeCredentialsFile: Faili halali ya vitambulisho vya Claude
providers.providerDetailPathAutoDetectedAllOs: Njia hugunduliwa kiotomatiki kwa kila OS (Linux/Mac/Windows).
providers.providerDetailPathAutoDetected: Njia hugunduliwa kiotomatiki kwa kila OS (Linux/Mac).
providers.webFetchTooltip: Watoa huduma wanaochuja maudhui kutoka kwenye URL za wavuti (HTML → Markdown, kukwangua, picha ya skrini)
providers.webFetchProvidersHeading: Watoa Huduma wa Urejeshaji wa Wavuti
providers.compatibleProvidersDesc: Sehemu za mwisho (endpoints) zinazoendana na OpenAI na zinazoendana na Anthropic unazohodhi au kuzisanidi. Elekeza SDK yoyote ya OpenAI kwenye URL yako mwenwenye na uelekeze maombi hapa.
providers.oauthProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma walioidhinishwa kupitia OAuth — ingia mara moja na OmniRoute inashughulikia ubadilishaji wa tokeni kiotomatiki.
providers.webCookieProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma hawa hutumia vipindi vya wavuti vya kivinjari, vidakuzi, au tokeni za wavuti badala ya vitufe vya API. Fungua mtoa huduma ili kuongeza kitambulisho kinachohitajika cha kipindi.
providers.apiKeyProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma wa kawaida wa funguo za API. Ongeza ufunguo wako mara moja na OmniRoute itaelekeza, kujaribu tena, na kuweka vikomo vya kasi kwa niaba yako.
providers.noAuthProvidersDesc: Sehemu za mwisho wazi zisizohitaji vitambulisho — tayari kutumika mara moja bila usajili wowote.
providers.upstreamProxyProvidersDesc: Elekeza trafiki inayotoka kupitia proksi ya juu kabla ya kufikia mtoa huduma. Inafaa kwa mitandao ya kampuni au ukaguzi wa trafiki.
providers.webFetchProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma wanaochukua na kutoa maudhui kutoka kwenye URL za wavuti. Watumie kuweka muktadha wa maagizo kwa data hai ya wavuti.
providers.aggregatorsGatewaysDesc: Wajumlishaji wa watoa huduma wengi na malango ya AI yanayotoa API moja iliyounganishwa kwenye dazeni za mifano ya kimsingi.
providers.enterpriseCloudDesc: Mifano ya kiwango cha biashara na inayohodhiwa kwenye wingu yenye SLA zilizoboreshwa, vyeti vya kufuata sheria, na uwezo wa kujitolea.
providers.cloudAgentProvidersDesc: Wakala wa wingu wanaojiendesha wenyewe wanaotekeleza majukumu ya muda mrefu yenye idhini ya mpango na ufuatiliaji wa hali ya moja kwa moja.
providers.localProvidersDesc: Mifano inayohodhiwa binafsi inayofanya kazi kwenye vifaa vyako mwenyewe. Hakuna data inayoondoka kwenye miundombinu yako.
providers.searchProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma wa utafutaji wa wavuti na nyaraka. Waambatanishe kwenye simu za LLM kwa Urejeshaji Uliodhabitiwa na Uzalishaji (RAG).
providers.audioProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma wa maandishi-hadi-hotuba na hotuba-hadi-maandishi kwa I/O ya sauti na michakato ya unukuzi wa sauti.
providers.embeddingRerankProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma wa upachikaji wa vekta na upangaji upya wa nafasi kwa utafutaji wa kisemantiki, michakato ya RAG, na alama za ufanano.
providers.imageProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma wa uzalishaji wa picha na maono — tengeneza picha kutoka kwa maandishi au uchanganue zilizopo.
providers.videoProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma wa uzalishaji wa video. Tengeneza klipu fupi za video kutoka kwa maagizo ya maandishi au picha.
providers.onboardingWizard: Mchawi wa Kuingia kwa Mtoa huduma
providers.onboardingWizardDescription: Unganisha ufunguo wa API, unaotumika na watoa huduma wa OAuth kwa uthibitishaji, uthabiti na jaribio la muunganisho la papo hapo.
providers.onboardingTypeApiKeyTitle: Mtoa huduma wa ufunguo wa API
providers.onboardingTypeApiKeyText: Tumia watoa huduma waliojengewa ndani kama vile OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, Azure, na zaidi.
providers.onboardingTypeCustomText: Unda ncha inayooana na OpenAI-, Anthropic-, au Claude Code na uongeze ufunguo wake.
providers.onboardingTypeOAuthText: Tumia tena OAuth iliyopo, msimbo wa kifaa, au mtiririko wa uingizaji wa ndani kwa watoa huduma wa usimbaji.
providers.onboardingChooseApiKeyProvider: Chagua mtoaji wa ufunguo wa API
providers.onboardingChooseProviderDescription: Chagua mtoa huduma, kisha mchawi atakuongoza kupitia vitambulisho na majaribio.
providers.onboardingSavingCompatibleConnection: Inahifadhi muunganisho unaooana wa mtoa huduma...
providers.onboardingCustomProviderFailed: Uingizaji wa mtoa huduma maalum haukufaulu
providers.onboardingOAuthNoConnectionFound: OAuth imekamilika, lakini hakuna muunganisho wa mtoa huduma uliopatikana.
providers.onboardingProviderSpecificIdPlaceholder: Kitambulisho cha hiari cha mtoa huduma mahususi
providers.onboardingCreateCustomCompatibleDescript: Mchawi huunda nodi ya mtoa huduma kwanza, kisha huhifadhi na kupima uunganisho wake wa ufunguo wa API.
providers.onboardingProviderPrefixHint: Hutumika kutengeneza kitambulisho cha mtoa huduma anayesimamiwa.
providers.onboardingOAuthFlowDescription: OmniRoute itafungua mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth kwa mtoa huduma huyu. Baada ya kuingia, mchawi hupakia tena muunganisho uliohifadhiwa na huendesha jaribio la muunganisho sawa na ukurasa wa mtoa huduma.

onboardingProviderDescriptions.360ai: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye ai.360.cn
onboardingProviderDescriptions.agentrouter: Pata salio la bure la $200 kwenye https://agentrouter.org/register — kadi ya mkopo haihitajiki.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.aimlapi: Kiwango cha bure kimesitishwa (2026) — API ya AI/ML sasa ni ya kulipia unavyotumia pekee (kiwango cha chini cha kuongeza salio ni $20); hakuna salio la bure linalojirudia.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.ai21: Salio la jaribio la $10 unapojisajili (linatumika kwa miezi 3), kadi ya mkopo haihitajiki
onboardingProviderDescriptions.alibaba: Unganisha Alibaba ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.alibaba-cn: Unganisha Alibaba (China) ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.bailian-coding-plan: Unganisha Alibaba Coding Plan ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.bedrock: Muunganisho asili wa Bedrock: ugunduzi wa muundo unatumia miundo ya msingi ya Bedrock na wasifu wa makisio, huku gumzo likitumia API za kikanda za Bedrock Runtime Converse/ConverseStream.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.anthropic: Unganisha Anthropic ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.api-airforce: Pata ufunguo wako wa API kutoka https://panel.api.airforce — endpoint inayoendana na OpenAI kwenye https://api.airforce/v1
onboardingProviderDescriptions.arcee-ai: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye arcee.ai
onboardingProviderDescriptions.azure-ai: Foundry hutumia kiolesura cha OpenAI v1 chenye majina ya deployment kama miundo. OmniRoute husawazisha URL za rasilimali za mzizi kwenye endpoint za v1 chat na /models.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.azure-openai: Tumia ufunguo wako wa API wa Azure OpenAI. URL ya msingi inapaswa kuwa endpoint ya rasilimali yako, kwa mfano https://my-resource.openai.azure.com.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.bai: Ufunguo wa Bearer API kwa lango la LLM la b.ai linaloendana na OpenAI (tofauti na TheB.AI). Unda ufunguo kwenye https://docs.b.ai, kisha utumie https://api.b.ai/v1 kama URL ya msingi inayoendana na OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.baichuan: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye platform.baichuan-ai.com
onboardingProviderDescriptions.baidu: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye console.bce.baidu.com
onboardingProviderDescriptions.qianfan: Tumia ufunguo wa API wa Qianfan kutoka Baidu AI Cloud. Endpoint chaguomsingi inaendana na OpenAI v2.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.baseten: Salio la jaribio la bure la $30 kwa ajili ya GPU inference
onboardingProviderDescriptions.bazaarlink: Unda ufunguo wa bure wa API kwenye https://bazaarlink.ai — mfano 'auto:free' unaelekeza kwenye makisio ya gharama ya sifuri. Miundo yote hutumia muundo wa provider/model-name, k.f. xiaomi/mimo-v2.5-pro.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.black-forest-labs: Unganisha Black Forest Labs ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.blackbox: Kiwango cha bure: gumzo la msingi lisilo na kikomo pamoja na Minimax-M2.5, kadi ya mkopo haihitajiki
onboardingProviderDescriptions.bluesminds: Pata ufunguo wako wa API kwenye https://www.bluesminds.com — endpoint inayoendana na OpenAI kwenye https://api.bluesminds.com/v1 ikiwa na salio la bure la kila siku. Miundo ya VIP (Claude Opus 4.5, Gemini 2.5 Pro) hutumia salio la pi.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.byteplus: Unganisha BytePlus ModelArk ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.bytez: Salio la bure la $1, husasishwa kila baada ya wiki 4
onboardingProviderDescriptions.cerebras: Jaribio la Bure: tokens 1M/siku, 30K TPM, 5 RPM — bila kadi ya mkopo.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.charm-hyper: Unda ufunguo wa API kwenye https://hyper.charm.land, kisha ubandike hapa kama tokeni ya Bearer.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.chutes: Ufunguo wa Bearer API kwa lango la Chutes linaloendana na OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.clarifai: Clarifai hutoa gumzo, majibu na /models zinazoendana na OpenAI kwenye /v2/ext/openai/v1. Miundo ya umma/jumuiya kwa kawaida huhitaji PAT; funguo zenye upeo wa programu hufanya kazi tu kwa rasilimali zilizo ndani ya programu hiyo.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.cloudflare-ai: Inahitaji Tokeni ya API NA ID ya Akaunti (inapatikana kwenye dash.cloudflare.com)
onboardingProviderDescriptions.codestral: Unganisha Codestral ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.cohere: Jaribio la Bure: simu za API 1,000/mwezi kwa ajili ya majaribio, kadi ya mkopo haihitajiki
onboardingProviderDescriptions.command-code: Unda au unakili ufunguo wa API kutoka Command Code, kisha ubandike hapa kama tokeni ya Bearer.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.coze: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye coze.com/open/api
onboardingProviderDescriptions.crof: Unganisha CrofAI ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.databricks: Unganisha Databricks ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.datarobot: Lango chaguomsingi linaorodhesha miundo inayotumika kutoka /genai/llmgw/catalog/. URL za usambazaji pia zinasaidiwa kwa maombi ya moja kwa moja ya gumzo yanayoendana na OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.deepinfra: Salio la bure la kujisajili kwa ajili ya majaribio ya API na ugunduzi wa miundo
onboardingProviderDescriptions.deepseek: Tokens milioni 5 za bure unapojisajili - kadi ya mkopo haihitajiki
onboardingProviderDescriptions.dgrid: Unda ufunguo wa API wa DGrid kwenye https://dgrid.ai, kisha utumie https://api.dgrid.ai/v1 kama URL ya msingi inayoendana na OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.dify: Pata ufunguo wa API kutoka kwenye instance yako ya Dify.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.digitalocean: Unganisha DigitalOcean ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.dit: dit.ai (Distributed Intelligence Trade) ni router/lango linaloendana na OpenAI likiwa na bei inayobadilika kulingana na ombi, likitoa /v1/chat/completions kwenye https://api.dit.ai/v1. OmniRoute hutumia itifaki ya OpenAI; uchanganuzi wa matumizi/akiba upo kwenye dashibodi ya dit.ai.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.doubao: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye console.volcengine.com
onboardingProviderDescriptions.empower: Empower hutoa gumzo linaloendana na OpenAI kwenye https://app.empower.dev/api/v1 ikiwa na usaidizi wa tool-calling kwenye empower-functions.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.factory: Pata ufunguo wako wa API wa Factory kwenye https://app.factory.ai/settings/api-keys, kisha ubandike kama tokeni ya Bearer. Endpoint inayoendana na OpenAI kwenye https://api.factory.ai/v1.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.fal-ai: Unganisha Fal.ai ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.featherless-ai: Kiwango cha bure kinapatikana — kadi ya mkopo haihitajiki
onboardingProviderDescriptions.fenayai: Ufunguo wa Bearer API kwa lango la FenayAI linaloendana na OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.firecrawl: Unganisha Firecrawl ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.fireworks: Salio la kuanzia la bure la $1 unapojisajili kwa ajili ya majaribio ya API
onboardingProviderDescriptions.freeaiapikey: Proksi ya API yenye punguzo la bei kwa miundo 40+ ikijumuisha GPT-5, Claude Opus 4.6, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Qwen 3.5. Pata ufunguo wako wa API kwenye https://freeaiapikey.com/dashboard. URL ya Msingi: https://freeaiapikey.com/v1.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.freemodel-dev: Pata salio la bure la API la $300 kwenye https://freemodel.dev — taarifa za malipo hazihitajiki. Endpoint inayoendana na OpenAI. Miundo ya GPT-5.4 na GPT-5.5 inapatikana.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.friendliai: Kiwango cha bure cha serverless inference — kadi ya mkopo haihitajiki
onboardingProviderDescriptions.gemini: Bure milele: maombi 1,500/siku kwa ajili ya Gemini 2.5 Flash — bila kadi ya mkopo, pata ufunguo kwenye aistudio.google.com
onboardingProviderDescriptions.gigachat: Unganisha GigaChat (Sber) ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.github-models: Unda PAT ya GitHub yenye upeo wa 'models: read' kwenye github.com/settings/tokens
onboardingProviderDescriptions.gitlab: Tokeni ya ufikiaji ya kibinafsi ya GitLab kwa API ya umma ya Code Suggestions. Sanidi URL msingi inayojiendesha yenyewe wakati hutumii gitlab.com.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.gitlawb-gmi: Pata ufunguo wako wa API kutoka kwenye dashibodi ya Gitlawb Opengateway.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.gitlawb: Pata ufunguo wako wa API kutoka kwenye dashibodi ya Gitlawb Opengateway.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.glm: Unganisha GLM Coding ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.glm-cn: Unganisha GLM Coding (China) ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.glmt: Wasifu wa GLM uliowekwa mapema wenye bajeti ya juu ya tokeni, kufikiri kumewezeshwa, na muda mrefu zaidi wa kusubiri.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.getgoapi: Unganisha GoAPI ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.groq: Kiwango cha bure: 30 RPM / 14.4K RPD — hakuna kadi ya mkopo
onboardingProviderDescriptions.hackclub: Ingia ukitumia akaunti yako ya Hack Club kwenye ai.hackclub.com.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.haiper: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye haiper.ai/haiper-api
onboardingProviderDescriptions.heroku: Unganisha Heroku AI ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.hcnsec: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye api.hcnsec.cn
onboardingProviderDescriptions.huggingface: API ya makisio ya bure kwa maelfu ya mifano (Whisper, VITS, SDXL…)
onboardingProviderDescriptions.hyperbolic: Salio la majaribio la $1-5 unapojisajili kwa ajili ya makisio yasiyo na seva
onboardingProviderDescriptions.watsonx: Lango la mfano la watsonx linaweka wazi /chat/completions na /models zinazoendana na OpenAI chini ya /ml/gateway/v1.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.ideogram: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye ideogram.ai/docs/api
onboardingProviderDescriptions.iflytek: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye console.xfyun.cn
onboardingProviderDescriptions.inference-net: $25 salio la bure unapojisajili pamoja na ruzuku za utafiti zinazopatikana
onboardingProviderDescriptions.jina-ai: Ufunguo wa API wa Bearer kwa ajili ya API ya rerank ya Jina AI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.jina-reader: Unganisha Jina Reader ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.kenari: Kenari inaweka wazi endpoint ya ukamilishaji wa soga inayooana na OpenAI kwenye https://kenari.id/v1/chat/completions, pamoja na katalogi hai ya /v1/models inayojumuisha Claude, GPT, DeepSeek, GLM, Kimi na zaidi. OmniRoute hutumia itifaki ya OpenAI na kuorodhesha mifano kupitia passthrough.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.kie: Unganisha KIE.AI ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.kilo-gateway: Unganisha Kilo Gateway ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.kimi: Unganisha Kimi ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.kimi-coding-apikey: Unganisha Kimi Coding (Ufunguo wa API) ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.lambda-ai: Unganisha Lambda AI ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.laozhang: Unganisha LaoZhang AI ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.leonardo: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye leonardo.ai/developer
onboardingProviderDescriptions.liquid: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye liquid.ai
onboardingProviderDescriptions.llamagate: Unganisha LlamaGate ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.llm7: Inafanya kazi bila ufunguo wa API (tumia 'unused' kama ufunguo). Pata tokeni ya bure kwenye token.llm7.io kwa viwango vya juu zaidi.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.longcat: Bure: ruzuku ya mara moja ya tokeni milioni 10 baada ya usajili wa akaunti + uthibitishaji wa KYC (LongCat-2.0). Ya mara moja tu — si marupurupu ya kila siku/kila mwezi yanayojirudia.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.maritalk: Unganisha Maritalk ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.meta-llama: Unganisha API ya Meta Llama ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.minimax-cn: Unganisha Minimax (China) ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.minimax: Unganisha Minimax Coding ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.mistral: Kiwango cha Jaribio la bure: ufikiaji wenye kikomo cha kasi kwa mifano yote, hakuna kadi ya mkopo inayohitajika
onboardingProviderDescriptions.modal: Kwa kawaida Modal huhudumia programu zinazotembelewa na mtumiaji zinazooana na OpenAI kwenye /v1. OmniRoute itachunguza /v1/models na kuelekeza trafiki ya soga kwenye /v1/chat/completions.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.modelscope: Kiwango cha bure kupitia API-Inference ya ModelScope — akaunti ya Alibaba inahitajika.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.monsterapi: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye monsterapi.ai
onboardingProviderDescriptions.moonshot: Unganisha Moonshot AI ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.nanogpt: Unganisha NanoGPT ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.nebius: Salio la majaribio la ~$1 wakati wa kujisajili kwa ajili ya majaribio ya API
onboardingProviderDescriptions.nlpcloud: NLP Cloud hutumia API ya soga ya kibiashara inayomilikiwa badala ya soga/ukamilishaji wa OpenAI. OmniRoute hubadilisha ujumbe wa OpenAI kuwa ingizo/muktadha/historia na kuweka wazi katalogi ya ndani ya mifano inayotumika ya chatbot.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.nomic: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye atlas.nomic.ai
onboardingProviderDescriptions.nous-research: Nous inaweka wazi kiolesura cha /v1 kinachooana na OpenAI chenye katalogi kubwa ya mbali ya /models. Endpoint ya /chat/completions inahitaji ufunguo halali wa API kwa ajili ya makisio ya programu.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.novita: Salio la majaribio la $0.50 unapojisajili (halali kwa karibu mwaka 1)
onboardingProviderDescriptions.nscale: Salio la bure la $5 unapojisajili kwa ajili ya majaribio ya makisio
onboardingProviderDescriptions.nube: Unganisha Nube.sh ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.nvidia: Ufikiaji wa bure wa msanidi programu: ~40 RPM, mifano 70+ (Kimi K2.5, GLM 4.7, DeepSeek V3.2...)
onboardingProviderDescriptions.oci: OCI inaweka wazi endpoints za soga na majibu zinazooana na OpenAI. Kitambulisho cha Mradi (Project ID) ni cha hiari katika OmniRoute lakini kinaweza kuhitajika kwa Majibu na utendakazi wa kikala.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.ollama-cloud: Unganisha Ollama Cloud ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.openadapter: OpenAdapter inaweka wazi endpoint ya ukamilishaji wa soga inayooana na OpenAI kwenye https://api.openadapter.in/v1/chat/completions, ikijumlisha mifano 70+ ya chanzo wazi (DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, MiniMax, GLM, Llama, Mistral, …). OmniRoute hutumia itifaki ya OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.openai: Unganisha OpenAI ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.opencode-go: Unganisha OpenCode Go ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.opencode-zen: Unganisha OpenCode Zen ukitumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.openrouter: Mifano ya bure kwa $0/tokeni yenye kiambishi tamati cha :free - 20 RPM / 200 RPD
onboardingProviderDescriptions.openvecta: Salio la bure unapojisajili kwa ajili ya inference inayotangamana na OpenAI kwenye LLMs, embeddings, na modeli za reasoning
onboardingProviderDescriptions.orcarouter: Unda ufunguo wa API (unaanza na sk-orca-) kwenye https://www.orcarouter.ai, kisha ubandike kama tokeni ya Bearer. Endpoint inayotangamana na OpenAI kwenye https://api.orcarouter.ai/v1.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.ovhcloud: Unganisha OVHcloud AI na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.perplexity: Unganisha Perplexity na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.piapi: Unganisha PiAPI na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.pioneer: $75 salio la matumizi ya bure — kadi ya mkopo haihitajiki
onboardingProviderDescriptions.poe: Poe hutoa gumzo na majibu yanayotangamana na OpenAI kwenye https://api.poe.com/v1, pamoja na ukaguzi wa salio lililothibitishwa kwenye /usage/current_balance.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.pollinations: Kiwango cha bure kisicho na ufunguo: openai, openai-fast, openai-large, qwen-coder, mistral, deepseek, grok, gemini-flash-lite-3.1, perplexity-fast, perplexity-reasoning. Modeli za Premium (claude, gemini, midijourney) zinahitaji ufunguo wa API wa Pollinations kutoka enter.pollinations.ai.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.publicai: Inahitaji ufunguo wa API — salio la usajili wa mara moja, kisha malipo
onboardingProviderDescriptions.puter: Pata tokeni kwenye puter.com/dashboard → Nakili Auth Token
onboardingProviderDescriptions.qiniu: Unda ufunguo wa API ya inference ya Qiniu AI kwenye https://portal.qiniu.com/ai-inference/api-key, kisha ubandike hapa kama tokeni ya Bearer. Endpoint inayotangamana na OpenAI kwenye https://api.qnaigc.com/v1, ikifanya uunganishaji wa kati (proxying) kwa DeepSeek, Claude, Kimi na nyinginezo nyuma ya ufunguo mmoja.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.recraft: Unganisha Recraft na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.reka: Reka Chat inatangamana na OpenAI kwenye /v1. OmniRoute huchunguza /v1/models na kuelekeza trafiki ya gumzo kwenye /v1/chat/completions.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.requesty: Unda ufunguo wa API kwenye https://app.requesty.ai, kisha ubandike hapa kama tokeni ya Bearer. Endpoint inayotangamana na OpenAI kwenye https://router.requesty.ai/v1, ikiwa na katalogi hai ya /v1/models.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.runwayml: Uundaji wa video wa Runway unategemea kazi (task-based). OmniRoute huwasilisha kazi za maandishi-kenda-video (text-to-video) au picha-kenda-video (image-to-video), huuliza /v1/tasks/[id], na kusanifisha matokeo ya video yaliyomalizika kurudi kwenye jibu linalofanana na OpenAI la /v1/videos/generations.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.sambanova: $5 salio la bure unapojisajili (muda wa matumizi wa siku 30), hakuna kadi ya mkopo inayohitajika
onboardingProviderDescriptions.sap: Ugunduzi wa modeli unatumia /v2/lm/scenarios/foundation-models/models kwenye AI_API_URL. Maombi ya gumzo yanatumia deploymentUrl/chat/completions na yanahitaji AI-Resource-Group.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.scaleway: Tokeni za bure milioni 1 kwa akaunti mpya — inayotii EU/GDPR (Paris), Qwen3 235B & Llama 70B
onboardingProviderDescriptions.sensenova: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye platform.sensenova.cn
onboardingProviderDescriptions.siliconflow: $1 salio la bure pamoja na modeli za bure kabisa baada ya uthibitishaji wa utambulisho
onboardingProviderDescriptions.snowflake: Unganisha Snowflake Cortex na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.sparkdesk: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye console.xfyun.cn
onboardingProviderDescriptions.stability-ai: Unganisha Stability AI na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.stepfun: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye platform.stepfun.com
onboardingProviderDescriptions.sumopod: SumoPod hutoa endpoint inayotangamana na OpenAI kwa ajili ya chat completions kwenye https://ai.sumopod.com/v1/chat/completions, pamoja na katalogi hai ya /v1/models. OmniRoute inatumia itifaki ya OpenAI na kuorodhesha modeli kupitia passthrough.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.suno: Bandika kuki ya kipindi (session cookie) kutoka suno.ai (auth ya Clerk)
onboardingProviderDescriptions.synthetic: Unganisha Synthetic na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.tencent: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye console.cloud.tencent.com
onboardingProviderDescriptions.thebai: Ufunguo wa Bearer API kwa ajili ya lango la TheB.AI linalotangamana na OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.together: Unganisha Together AI na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.tokenrouter: TokenRouter hutoa endpoint inayotangamana na OpenAI ya chat completions kwenye https://api.tokenrouter.com/v1/chat/completions, pamoja na katalogi inayofanya kazi ya /v1/models. OmniRoute inatumia itifaki ya OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.topaz: Unganisha Topaz na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.udio: Bandika kuki ya kipindi (session cookie) kutoka udio.com (auth ya Supabase)
onboardingProviderDescriptions.uncloseai: Hakuna uthibitishaji unaohitajika. API inakubali mfuatano wowote usio tupu kama ufunguo wa utambulisho.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.upstage: Unganisha Upstage na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.v0-vercel: Unganisha v0 (Vercel) na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.venice: Unganisha Venice.ai na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.vercel-ai-gateway: Unganisha Vercel AI Gateway na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.vertex: Weka JSON ya Service Account au access_token ya OAuth
onboardingProviderDescriptions.vertex-partner: Weka JSON hiyo hiyo ya Service Account inayotumika kwa modeli za washirika wa Vertex AI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.volcengine: Unganisha Volcengine na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.voyage-ai: Ufunguo wa Bearer API kwa ajili ya embeddings za Voyage AI na API za rerank.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.wandb: Unganisha Weights & Biases Inference na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.x5lab: X5Lab hutoa endpoint inayotangamana na OpenAI ya chat completions kwenye https://api.x5lab.dev/v1/chat/completions, pamoja na katalogi hai ya /v1/models. OmniRoute inatumia itifaki ya OpenAI na kuorodhesha modeli kupitia passthrough.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.xai: Unganisha xAI (Grok) na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.xiaomi-mimo: Unganisha Xiaomi MiMo na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.yi: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye platform.lingyiwanwu.com
onboardingProviderDescriptions.zenmux: ZenMux hutoa endpoint inayotangamana na OpenAI ya chat completions kwenye /api/v1/chat/completions, pamoja na mifumo ya itifaki ya Anthropic Messages (/api/anthropic/v1/messages) na Google Gemini (/api/vertex-ai). OmniRoute inatumia itifaki ya OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.galadriel: Unganisha Galadriel na ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.predibase: $25 salio la jaribio la bure (muda wa matumizi wa siku 30)
onboardingProviderDescriptions.chenzk: Lango linalotangamana na OpenAI lenye katalogi hai ya modeli kwenye chenzk.top.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.freepik: Tengeneza picha kwa kutumia Mystic API ya Freepik.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.freetheai: Njia ya bure inayoendana na OpenAI yenye usaidizi wa modeli ya passthrough.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.g4f-gemini: Proksi kinyume ya g4f.space ya bure isiyo na ufunguo kwenda Gemini, yenye kikomo cha maombi 5 kwa dakika.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.g4f-groq: Proksi kinyume ya g4f.space ya bure isiyo na ufunguo kwenda Groq, yenye kikomo cha maombi 5 kwa dakika.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.g4f-nvidia: Proksi kinyume ya g4f.space ya bure isiyo na ufunguo kwenda NVIDIA NIM, yenye kikomo cha maombi 5 kwa dakika.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.g4f-ollama: Njia ya Ollama iliyohifadhiwa ya bure isiyo na ufunguo kutoka g4f.space, yenye kikomo cha maombi 5 kwa dakika.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.g4f-pollinations: Proksi kinyume ya g4f.space ya bure isiyo na ufunguo kwenda Pollinations, yenye kikomo cha maombi 5 kwa dakika.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.mixedbread: Unda embeddings kwa kutumia API ya Mixedbread.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.segmind: Zalisha picha na video kwa kutumia modeli zilizohifadhiwa za Segmind.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.amazon-q: Inatumia AWS Builder ID ile ile au mtiririko wa refresh-token ulioagizwa kama Kiro, lakini inaweka miunganisho ya Amazon Q kando.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.antigravity: Unganisha Antigravity na mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.agy: Ingiza kuingia kwako kwa Antigravity CLI (`agy`) (bandika/pakia faili yake ya tokeni), tambua kiotomatiki kuingia kwa CLI ya ndani, au ingia na Google. Inashiriki mfumo wa nyuma (backend) wa Antigravity (pamoja na modeli za Claude).
onboardingProviderDescriptions.claude: Unganisha Claude Code na mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.cline: Unganisha Cline na mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.cursor: Unganisha Cursor IDE na mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.github: Unganisha GitHub Copilot na mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.gitlab-duo: Programu ya OAuth yenye upeo wa ai_features + read_user. Sanidi GITLAB_DUO_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID na kwa hiari GITLAB_DUO_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET kwenye mfano huu wa OmniRoute.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.kilocode: Unganisha Kilo Code na mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.kimi-coding: Unganisha Kimi Coding na mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.kiro: Kiwango cha bure: mikopo 50/mwezi (~tokeni 25K–100K). ⚠️ Sheria na Masharti ya Kiro (ToS) zinakataza matumizi ya proksi/harness ya washirika wa tatu.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.codex: Unganisha OpenAI Codex na mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.qwen: Unganisha Qwen Code na mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.

providers.passthroughModelsDescription: {provider} inakubali vitambulisho vya asili vya mtoa huduma. Ingiza kutoka /miundo au ongeza vitambulisho maalum vya kuelekeza.
providers.bedrockModelsDescription: Mitindo ya Amazon Bedrock inatolewa na eneo la AWS. Ingiza kutoka /miundo au ongeza vitambulisho vya muundo wa Bedrock vilivyowezeshwa katika eneo lililochaguliwa.
providers.webCookieCredentialHint: Kidakuzi kinachohitajika: {credential}. Bandika thamani ya kichwa cha Kidakuzi kutoka kwa kipindi chako cha wavuti cha {provider} ulichoingia. Usijumuishe Kidakuzi: kiambishi awali.
providers.webTokenCredentialHint: Kitambulisho: {credential}. Bandika thamani ya tokeni kutoka kwa kipindi chako cha wavuti cha {provider} ulichoingia, au uhamishaji wa DevTools HAR ikiwa mtoa huduma ataitumia.
providers.webCookieEditHint: Acha wazi ili kuweka kidakuzi cha kipindi cha sasa. Kidakuzi kinachohitajika: {credential}.
providers.webTokenEditHint: Acha wazi ili kuweka tokeni ya sasa ya kipindi cha wavuti. Kitambulisho: {credential}.
providers.webSessionGuideTitle: Jinsi ya kupata kitambulisho cha kikao
providers.webSessionGuideIntro: {provider} hutumia kipindi cha wavuti cha kivinjari badala ya ufunguo wa API.
providers.webSessionGuideStep2: Fungua zana za msanidi wa kivinjari na uangalie ombi lililotolewa na programu ya wavuti.
providers.webSessionGuideStep3: Nakili kitambulisho kinachohitajika kutoka kwa kikoa cha mtoaji mwenyewe. Kwa vidakuzi, nakili tu thamani ya kichwa cha Kuki na uache Cookie:.
providers.webSessionGuideStep4: Ibandike hapa na uangalie muunganisho. Ikiacha kufanya kazi, ingia tena na uibadilishe kwa thamani mpya.
providers.webSessionSecurityHint: Lichukulie hili kama nenosiri: linaweza kufikia akaunti yako ya wavuti uliyoingia hadi itakapoisha au kubatilishwa.
providers.webNoAuthGuideBody: {provider} haihitaji ufunguo wa API au kidakuzi. Hifadhi muunganisho ili utumie mwisho wake wa wavuti bila malipo.
providers.webSessionCredentialValidationFailed: Uthibitishaji wa kitambulisho cha kipindi umeshindwa. Ingia tena, nakili kitambulisho kipya, na ujaribu tena.
providers.huggingchatDesc: Gumzo la bure la LLM kupitia huggingface.co/chat
providers.poeWebDesc: Gumzo la modeli nyingi kupitia poe.com
providers.v0VercelWebDesc: Uzalishaji wa msimbo wa AI kupitia v0.dev
providers.kimiWebDesc: Gumzo la mtumiaji la Moonshot AI kupitia www.kimi.com (kimataifa, Connect-RPC API)
providers.doubaoWebDesc: Gumzo la AI la ByteDance kupitia dola.com
providers.overrideBaseUrlHint: Kina: elekeza mtoa huduma huyu aliyejengewa ndani kwenye endpoint maalum. Acha tupu ili kutumia chaguo-msingi.
providers.bulkAddFormatHintCloudflare: Ufunguo mmoja kwa kila mstari. Muundo: name|accountId|apiKey (ID ya akaunti ya Cloudflare + tokeni ya API).
providers.lmarenaWebCookieHint: Fungua arena.ai, ingia, kisha nakili kielewa kizima cha Cookie kutoka kwenye ombi la Mtandao (Network request). Jumuisha arena-auth-prod-v1.0 na arena-auth-prod-v1.1 (na vipande vingine kama vipo), ikiwezekana na cf_clearance. Usibandike tu kuki tupu ya arena-auth-prod-v1. Hiari: providerSpecificData.recaptchaV3Token ikiwa create-evaluation bado inarudisha 403.

settings.title: Settings
settings.routingSettingsIntro: Hudhibiti jinsi maombi yako yanavyoelekezwa, kubadilishwa na kutumwa kwa watoa huduma wa AI.
settings.routingOpDropParagraphContainsDesc: Huondoa aya yoyote (kizuizi cha maandishi kilichogawanywa kwa mistari tupu) ndani ya kidokezo cha mfumo (system prompt) ambacho maandishi yake yana yoyote ya substrings zilizoorodheshwa. Tumia kuondoa alama za vidole za mteja wa chama cha tatu kama vile 'github.com/anomalyco/opencode' au 'docs.openwebui.com' ambazo zana ya kuainisha ya Anthropic inazitia alama.
settings.routingOpDropParagraphStartsWithDesc: Huondoa aya yoyote inayoonza na moja ya viambishi awali vilivyoorodheshwa. Tumia kwa mistari ya utambulisho kama vile 'You are OpenCode' au 'You are Open WebUI' ambayo hutangaza mteja anayetuma ombi.
settings.routingOpReplaceTextDesc: Hubadilisha substring halisi na substring nyingine halisi. Tumia kwa vishazi vya vichochezi vinavyojulikana — k.m. andika upya 'Here is some useful information about the environment you are running in:' kuwa 'Environment context you are running in:' (kishazi cha kichochezi kilichothibitishwa kiutendaji).
settings.routingOpReplaceRegexDesc: Hubadilisha maandishi yanayolingana na usemi wa kawaida (regular expression). Tumia unapohitaji ruwaza (madarasa ya herufi, nafasi nyeupe ya hiari, nanga) badala ya substrings halisi. Ruwaza yenye hitilafu hukamatwa wakati wa uendeshaji wakati operesheni inapoendeshwa.
settings.routingOpDropBlockContainsDesc: Huondoa vizuizi VYOTE vya mfumo (sio tu aya) ambavyo maandishi yake yana yoyote ya substrings zilizoorodheshwa. Tumia wakati block nzima ina alama ya vidole na unataka iondolewe — k.m. maelezo yaliyoingizwa ya seva ya MCP.
settings.routingOpPrependSystemBlockDesc: Huingiza kizuizi kipya cha maandishi MBELE ya safu ya mfumo (system array). Tumia kuongeza utambulisho wa SDK 'You are a Claude agent, built on Anthropic's Claude Agent SDK.' ambayo zana ya kuainisha ya Anthropic inatarajia.
settings.routingOpAppendSystemBlockDesc: Huingiza kizuizi kipya cha maandishi MWISHONI mwa safu ya mfumo (system array). Tumia kwa nyongeza za urembo ambazo hazihitaji kuwa kwenye nafasi ya [0].
settings.routingOpInjectBillingHeaderDesc: Hutanguliza kizuizi maalum cha maandishi cha 'x-anthropic-billing-header: cc_version=...; cc_entrypoint=...; cch=...;' ambacho zana ya kuainisha ya Anthropic inathibitisha. Inahitajika kwa endpoint za CC bridge relay; kwa mtoa huduma asilia wa claude, OmniRoute tayari inaingiza mstari wake wa malipo kwa hivyo operesheni hii kawaida huwa ya ziada hapo.
settings.routingOpObfuscateWordsDesc: Huingiza herufi ya Zero-Width-Joiner baada ya herufi ya kwanza ya kila neno lililoorodheshwa, ili 'opencode' iwe 'o‍pencode'. Inasomeka sawa kwa binadamu lakini inapita ulinganishaji wa maneno wa kiainishaji. Inalenga vizuizi vya mfumo, ujumbe wa mtumiaji/msaidizi, na maelezo ya zana.
settings.routingNeedlesHint: Orodha ya vijisehemu vya maandishi. Kifungu cha maneno kinalingana kikijumuisha HATA KIMOJA wapo. Ongeza kimoja kwa kila mstari kupitia 'Ongeza ingizo'.
settings.routingPrefixesHint: Orodha ya mifuatano ya herufi. Kifungu cha maneno kinalingana kikianza na yoyote kati yao (nafasi tupu ya mwanzo huondolewa kabla ya kulinganisha).
settings.routingCaseSensitiveHint: Ikiwa IMEWASHWA, 'OpenCode' na 'opencode' ni mifuatano tofauti. Ikiwa IMEZIMWA (chaguo-msingi), ulinganishaji hupuuza herufi kubwa/ndogo.
settings.routingMatchLiteralHint: Kijisehemu halisi cha maandishi cha kupata. Hakuna sintaksia ya regex — herufi maalum kama . * ? huchukuliwa kama zenyewe.
settings.routingReplacementTextHint: Mfuatano wa kubadilisha. Acha wazi ili kufuta ulinganifu. Tokeo huhifadhi maandishi yanayozunguka.
settings.routingAllOccurrencesHint: Ikiwa IMEWASHWA (chaguo-msingi), kila sehemu inabadilishwa. Ikiwa IMEZIMWA, ni ulinganifu wa kwanza tu unaobadilishwa.
settings.routingPatternHint: Chanzo cha regex cha JavaScript. Usiweke alama za kufungua na kufunga za mshazari — andika tu 'foo(.*)bar'. Seva hukataa ruwaza ambazo hazifanyi kazi wakati wa kukusanya.
settings.routingRegexFlagsHint: Bendera za regex za JavaScript (g = ulinganifu wote, i = haijali herufi kubwa/ndogo, s = nukta inalingana na mstari mpya, m = mistari mingi). Chaguo-msingi 'g'.
settings.routingBlockTextHint: Maandishi kamili ya kizuizi kipya cha mfumo. Tumia mfuatano halisi; kizuizi cha mfumo huhifadhi maandishi pekee.
settings.routingIdempotencyKeyHint: Si la lazima. Ikiwa imewekwa, operesheni hurukwa wakati kizuizi ambacho maandishi yake yanaanza na ufunguo huu kikiwa tayari kipo. Huzuia uongezaji mara mbili wakati wa kujaribu tena.
settings.routingBillingEntrypointHint: Thamani iliyoingizwa kama 'cc_entrypoint='. Anthropic inakubali 'sdk-cli' (Agent SDK), 'cli' (Claude Code CLI), au thamani zingine zilizoandikwa kwenye nyaraka.
settings.routingBillingVersionFormatHint: Jinsi hashi ya uundaji yenye herufi 3 baada ya cc_version= inavyokokotolewa. 'ex-machina' = sha256 ya CCH_SALT+herufi-kutoka-kwa-ujumbe-wa-kwanza-wa-mtumiaji+version (kwa kila ujumbe). 'omniroute-daystamp' = sha256 ya YYYY-MM-DD+version (thabiti kwa kila siku).
settings.routingBillingCchAlgoHint: Jinsi tokeni ya cch= yenye herufi 5 inavyokokotolewa. 'sha256-first-user' = sha256 ya maandishi ya kwanza ya ujumbe wa mtumiaji. 'xxhash64-body' = utiaji saini wa kiwango cha bodi utaijaza baadaye. 'static-zero' = kishikilia nafasi halisi cha '00000'.
settings.routingObfuscateWordsHint: Maneno ya herufi ndogo ya kuficha. Uingizaji wa ZWJ unatumika bila kujali herufi kubwa au ndogo, kwa hivyo 'opencode' pia inalingana na 'OpenCode' na 'OPENCODE'.
settings.routingObfuscateTargetsHint: Ni sehemu gani zitakazochanganuliwa kwa ajili ya maneno: vizuizi vya mfumo, ujumbe wa mtumiaji/msaidizi, na/au maelezo ya zana.
settings.routingSummarizeDropParagraphStartsWith: tupa vifungu vya maneno vinavyoanza na: {items}
settings.routingSummarizeInjectBillingHeader: ingiza kichwa cha malipo (entrypoint={entrypoint}, version={versionFormat}, cch={cchAlgo})
settings.routingDefaultAutoVariantLKGP: Mtoa Huduma wa Mwisho Anayejulikana kuwa Mzuri
settings.routingDefaultAutoVariantLKGPDesc: Mtoa Huduma wa Mwisho Anayejulikana kuwa Mzuri
settings.routingDefaultAutoVariantFast: Uelekezaji wa kuchelewa kwa kiwango cha chini
settings.routingDefaultAutoVariantFastDesc: Uelekezaji wa kuchelewa kwa kiwango cha chini
settings.resilienceSettingsIntro: Jaribu tena kiotomatiki, upunguzaji kasi na urejeshaji nyuma watoa huduma wanaposhindwa.
settings.aiSettingsIntro: Mipangilio mahususi ya AI ya bajeti ya kufikiria, tabia ya kielelezo, na mgandamizo.
settings.requestBodyLimitDescription: Maximum API payload size accepted before a request body is parsed. Dedicated upload routes keep at least their built-in 100 MB limit.
settings.requestBodyLimitLoadFailed: Failed to load request limit settings

settings.memoryEnabledDesc: When enabled, OmniRoute will inject relevant past context.

settings.purgeQuotaSnapshots: Futa kabisa Picha za Haraka za Kota
settings.storageUsageTokenBufferDesc: Tokeni za ziada zilizoongezwa kwenye matumizi yaliyoripotiwa ili kufidia gharama ya ziada ya kidokezo cha mfumo.
settings.storageUsageTokenBufferHint: Weka kuwa 0 ili kuripoti idadi ghafi ya tokeni za mtoa huduma. Chaguomsingi: 2000.
settings.redisLauncherDesc: Zindua kwa kubofya mara moja kontena la Redis 7 (Podman au Docker) kwa ajili ya akiba ya majibu, ufuatiliaji wa kota, na udhibiti wa kasi.
settings.redisLauncherHint: Ni sawa na kuendesha `omniroute redis up`. Kontena linaitwa `omniroute-redis` na linasikiliza kwenye 127.0.0.1:6379.
settings.compressionAdaptiveOff: Bajeti ya muktadha inayobadilika: imezimwa (kichochezi cha zamani cha kiotomatiki)

settings.resilienceEnableServerSideWait: Washa kusubiri kwa upande wa seva
settings.resilienceMaximumWaitPerRetry: Upeo wa kusubiri kwa kila jaribio tena
settings.cliproxyapiImportAuthDesc: Ingiza akaunti za OAuth ambazo tayari zimehifadhiwa na CLIProxyAPI katika ~/.cli-proxy-api/ kama miunganisho ya OmniRoute, ili usilazimike kuingia tena kwenye kila akaunti. Aina za akaunti zinazotumika (Gemini, Codex, Claude, Antigravity, Qwen, Kimi) zitaingizwa; zingine zitarukwa.
settings.payloadRulesDesc: Sanidi mabadiliko ya mzigo wa data wa ombi kulingana na mfano na itifaki. Mabadiliko yanahifadhiwa kwenye mipangilio na kupakiwa upya kwenye runtime mara moja baada ya kuhifadhi.
settings.payloadRuleDefaultDesc: Hutumia vigezo pale tu njia inayolengwa inapokosekana kwenye mzigo wa data unaotoka.
settings.payloadRuleOverrideDesc: Hulazimisha maadili kwenye mzigo wa data, ikichukua nafasi ya chochote ambacho tayari kipo kwenye njia hiyo.
settings.payloadRuleFilterDesc: Huondoa vigezo vilivyozuiwa kutoka kwenye mzigo wa data kabla ya ombi la juu kutumwa.
settings.payloadRuleDefaultRawDesc: Kama chaguo-msingi, lakini maadili ya mifuatano huchanganuliwa kama JSON kwanza inapowezekana. Lakabu ya zamani ya uingizaji default-raw pia inakubaliwa wakati wa kuhifadhi.
settings.payloadEditorDesc: Tumia umbo la schema ya runtime: default, override, filter, defaultRaw. API pia inakubali ufunguo wa pembejeo wa zamani wa default-raw.
settings.payloadResetInfo: Mhariri amerejeshwa kwenye kiolezo kisicho na upande. Hifadhi ili ukitumie.
settings.payloadSaveSuccess: Sheria za mzigo wa data zimehifadhiwa na kupakiwa upya.
settings.payloadMustBeObject: Sheria za mzigo wa data lazima ziwe kitu cha JSON.
settings.payloadInvalidJson: Mzigo wa data wa JSON sio halali.
settings.payloadValidJsonRequired: Sheria za mzigo wa data lazima ziwe JSON halali kabla ya kuhifadhi.
settings.savePayloadRules: Hifadhi Sheria za Mzigo wa Data
settings.requestLimitsDesc: Sanidi vikomo vya ombi vya kimataifa na ulinzi wa uendeshaji sambamba.
settings.maxRequestSizeDesc: Ukubwa wa juu unaoruhusiwa kwa maombi ya API yanayoingia.
settings.maxResponseSizeDesc: Ukubwa wa juu unaoruhusiwa kwa majibu ya API yanayotoka.
settings.maxRequestTokensLabel: Kiwango cha Juu cha Tokeni za Ombi
settings.maxRequestTokensDesc: Kiwango cha juu cha jumla ya tokeni zinazoruhusiwa katika ombi moja.
settings.maxResponseTokensLabel: Kiwango cha Juu cha Tokeni za Jibu
settings.maxResponseTokensDesc: Kiwango cha juu cha jumla ya tokeni zinazoruhusiwa katika jibu moja.
settings.modelCooldownsEmpty: Hakuna miundo katika hali baridi kwa sasa.
settings.modelCooldownsDescription: Mifano imetengwa kwa muda baada ya kufeli. Muda wa kupoa unapoisha inarudi kiotomatiki.
settings.modelCooldownsAllReactivated: Modeli zote zilizo kwenye cooldown zimeshawezeshwa tena.
settings.responsesStateHint: Otomatiki huondoa previous_response_id isipokuwa muunganisho uwezeshe waziwazi hifadhi ya OpenAI Responses. Ondoa ni salama zaidi kwa wateja wasio na hali (stateless clients) kama vile VS Code Custom Endpoint; muktadha kisha unategemea mteja kutuma historia nzima.
settings.responsesStateSaveError: Imeshindwa kusasisha mpangilio wa hali ya Majibu
settings.codexFastTierDesc: Kimataifa inject service_tier=priority kwa ajili ya maombi ya OpenAI Codex.
settings.codexFastTierHint: Ikiwezeshwa, OmniRoute inaongeza service_tier=priority kwa maombi ya nje ya Codex kwa miunganisho ambayo tayari haijabainisha kiwango. Kiwango cha kipaumbele kinahitaji ufunguo wa OpenAI Enterprise API au njia ya ChatGPT-auth Codex; aina zingine muhimu zitapokea hitilafu inayohusiana na tier kutoka OpenAI. Mipangilio ya kila muunganisho kwenye ukurasa wa mtoaji wa Codex huchukua nafasi ya kwanza.
settings.codexFastTierSaveError: Imeshindwa kusasisha mpangilio wa Codex Fast Tier
settings.codexAutoPingDesc: Opt-in per connection: sends a tiny request right after a Codex session window resets so it isn't cold when you need it.
settings.codexAutoPingWarning: Consumes a small amount of real Codex quota on every ping. Off by default — enable only for connections you actively rely on.
settings.codexAutoPingSaveError: Failed to update Codex Auto-Ping setting
settings.codexFastTierModelsHint: Ni modeli zilizochaguliwa tu ndizo zinazopokea service_tier wakati Fast Tier imewezeshwa.
settings.claudeFastModeDesc: Chagua maombi ya Claude yaliyochaguliwa katika Hali ya Haraka ya Anthropic (kasi:"haraka").
settings.claudeFastModeHint: Anthropic haiauni Rasmi Hali ya Haraka kwa wateja wa mtindo wa SDK. Inapowashwa, OmniRoute husonga mbele kichwa cha X-CPA-Force-Fast-Mode ili muundo wa CLIProxyAPI uliooanishwa uweze kuchagua kuingia kuharibu kiingilio. Miundo ya Opus iliyoorodheshwa pekee ndiyo inayowekwa na hundi ya upande wa mteja wa Anthropic. Kiwango cha usajili, Mpango wa Juu na salio la mkopo la Hali ya Haraka bado zinatekelezwa kwa upande wa seva - Anthropic inaweza kurudisha nje_ya_mikopo hata kigeuzi kikiwa kimewashwa.
settings.claudeFastModeSaveError: Imeshindwa kusasisha mpangilio wa Modi ya Haraka ya Claude

wildcard.title: CORS iko wazi kwa kila asili (CORS_ALLOW_ALL=true)
wildcard.desc: Tovuti yoyote inaweza kuita API ya seva hii kutoka kwa kivinjari cha mgeni. Tumia tu kwenye mitandao inayoaminika — weka asili maalum katika ALLOWED_ORIGINS na uzime CORS_ALLOW_ALL kwenye uzalishaji.

authz.title: Orodha ya Uidhinishaji
authz.description: Uainishaji wa njia wa viwango 5 wenye sera ya kupita ya moja kwa moja. Kusoma kunaonyesha taksonomia kamili; mabadiliko yatauliza tena nenosiri la usimamizi.

kill_switch.label: Swichi ya dharura ya kupita
kill_switch.desc: Kipengele kikuu cha kugeuza. Wakati kimezimwa, hakuna kiambishi awali cha LOCAL_ONLY kinachoweza kufikiwa kutoka kwa seva isiyo ya loopback bila kujali orodha ya kila kiambishi awali.

prefix.label: Viambishi awali vinavyoweza kupitwa
prefix.desc: Viambishi awali vya LOCAL_ONLY ambavyo funguo za API za upeo wa usimamizi (au vipindi vya dashibodi) vinaweza kufikia kutoka kwa seva zisizo za loopback.
prefix.empty: Hakuna viambishi awali vilivyosanidiwa. Kupita kumezimwa kabisa.

bypass.cli_tools_runtime_note: Kiambishi awali kinachoweza kuanzisha mchakato (spawn-capable). Imekataliwa wakati wa kutungwa (compile-time); haiwezi kufanywa kupitika. Inaonyeshwa kwa ajili ya kusoma tu.

prompt.label: Nenosiri la sasa
prompt.desc: Thibitisha tena ili kutumia mabadiliko yanayoathiri usalama.

badge.bypassable: Inayoweza kupitwa kupitia upeo wa usimamizi

error.PASSWORD_REQUIRED: Nenosiri la sasa linahitajika ili kutumia mabadiliko haya.
error.INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE: Ufunguo wa API hauna upeo wa usimamizi.
error.BYPASS_PREFIX_NOT_ALLOWED: Kiambishi awali kimoja au zaidi vinalenga njia zinazoweza kuanzisha mchakato (spawn-capable) na haziwezi kupitwa.

settings.resilienceRequestQueueTrigger: Kabla ya kutuma kwa mkondo wa juu
settings.resilienceRequestQueueEffect: Huweka maombi kwenye foleni, huzuia upatanifu, na huweka nafasi nje ya simu
settings.resilienceRequestQueueDesc: Safu hii inadhibiti tu kupanga foleni na mwendo. Haihifadhi baridi au vivunja mzunguko wazi.
settings.resilienceAutoEnableApiKeyProvidersDesc: Huwasha ulinzi wa foleni kwa chaguo-msingi kwa miunganisho ya vitufe vya API inayotumika.
settings.resilienceMaxQueueWait: Muda wa juu zaidi wa kusubiri kwenye foleni
settings.resilienceConnectionCooldownTrigger: Muunganisho unaporudisha hitilafu ya muda ya juu ya mkondo
settings.resilienceConnectionCooldownEffect: Huruka muunganisho huo kwa muda na huongeza urejesho kwa kushindwa mara kwa mara
settings.resilienceConnectionCooldownDesc: Upungufu wa msingi unashughulikia hitilafu za muda mfupi za muunganisho. Vidokezo vya kujaribu tena mkondo wa juu vinapowezeshwa, dirisha la wazi la mtoa huduma hubatilisha upunguzaji wa ndani.
settings.resilienceUseUpstreamRetryHintsDesc: Hutumia kujaribu-baada/kuweka upya thamani kutoka kwa mtoa huduma wa juu inapopatikana.
settings.resilienceUseUpstream429BreakerHints: Tumia vidokezo 429 vya juu kwa upunguzaji wa kikatiaji
settings.resilienceUseUpstream429BreakerHintsDesc: Tekeleza mawimbi ya Jaribu tena Baada ya / kiasi-kuisha kutoka kwa majibu 429 hadi muda wa kupoeza kwa kivunja mzunguko. Chaguomsingi hutumia sera ya kila mtoaji: watoa huduma za wingu moja kwa moja huwashwa; wakala wa nyuma, mwenyeji mwenyewe, na watoa huduma wanaoungwa mkono na CLI wamezimwa chaguomsingi. Haitegemei "Tumia vidokezo vya kujaribu tena juu ya mkondo".
settings.resilienceProviderBreakerTrigger: Hitilafu za mwisho za usafiri/seva baada ya urejeshaji wa muunganisho kuisha
settings.resilienceProviderBreakerEffect: Humzuia mtoa huduma huyo kwa muda hadi muda wa kuweka upya uishe
settings.resilienceProviderBreakerDesc: Hali ya kuvunja moja kwa moja inaonekana kwenye ukurasa wa Afya pekee. Viwango vya viwango vya 429 vilivyopitiwa na muunganisho hukaa katika Upunguzaji wa Muunganisho na usikwaruze kikatiza huduma.
settings.resilienceWaitForCooldownTrigger: Wakati miunganisho yote ya wagombea tayari inapoa
settings.resilienceWaitForCooldownEffect: Inasubiri kwenye seva na kujaribu tena wakati baridi ya kwanza inaisha
settings.resilienceWaitForCooldownDesc: Hii inaathiri tu ombi la sasa. Haihifadhi muunganisho au hali ya mtoa huduma.
settings.resilienceEnableServerWait: Washa kusubiri kwa upande wa seva
settings.resilienceEnableServerWaitDesc: Inapowashwa, OmniRoute husubiri upoeshaji wa kwanza kuisha na itajaribu tena kiotomatiki.
settings.resilienceMaxWaitPerAttempt: Upeo wa kusubiri kwa kila jaribio
settings.resilienceComboCooldownWaitTitle: Kusubiri kwa cooldown ya mchanganyiko wa mgao-shirikishi
settings.resilienceComboCooldownWaitDesc: Kwa mchanganyiko wa mgao-shirikishi tu: subiri cooldown fupi ya mpito na utume tena badala ya kurudisha 429 mara moja. Haisubiri kamwe kwenye quota_exhausted.
settings.resilienceComboCooldownWaitToggleDesc: Mchanganyiko wa mgao-shirikishi tu; haisubiri kamwe kwenye quota_exhausted.
settings.resilienceComboCooldownMaxWaitMs: Muda wa juu zaidi wa kusubiri kwa kila jaribio
settings.resilienceQuotaShareConcurrencyTitle: Uendeshaji sambamba kwa kila muunganisho wa mgao-shirikishi
settings.resilienceQuotaShareConcurrencyDesc: Kwa mchanganyiko wa mgao-shirikishi tu: wakati muunganisho unapoweka kikomo cha Max Concurrent, panga maombi ya sambamba kwenye akaunti hiyo ya usajili ili isizidi kikomo chake. Maombi ya ziada yanasubiri kwenye foleni badala ya kupata 429. Kikomo kinatoka kwenye uga wa Max Concurrent wa kila muunganisho; swichi hii inawezesha au kuzima tu utekelezaji wake.
settings.resilienceQuotaShareConcurrencyToggleDes: Mchanganyiko wa mgao-shirikishi tu; inaheshimu kikomo cha Max Concurrent cha kila muunganisho.
settings.resilienceProviderCooldownEffect: Hupita mtoa huduma aliyefeli kwa kipindi cha cooldown kabla ya kujaribu tena
settings.resilienceProviderCooldownDesc: Inazuia maombi yanayofuata kupitia tena watoa huduma wale wale wanaofeli. Cooldown inaongezeka kwa kipeo kulingana na kufeli mfululizo.
settings.resilienceProviderCooldownEnabled: Wezesha cooldown ya mtoa huduma ya kimataifa
settings.resilienceProviderCooldownEnabledDesc: Wakati imewezeshwa, watoa huduma waliofeli hufuatiliwa ulimwenguni kote na kupitwa kwa kipindi cha cooldown.
settings.resilienceProviderCooldownMin: Muda wa chini zaidi wa cooldown
settings.resilienceProviderCooldownMax: Muda wa juu zaidi wa cooldown
settings.forcedFingerprintTitle: Always enabled for {provider} — required for OAuth account safety; cannot be turned off.
settings.sessionAffinityDesc: Huweka mazungumzo moja kwenye akaunti hiyo hiyo kwa sekunde hizi, kwa mtoa huduma yeyote. 0 huizima.
settings.resetAwareQuotaCacheTitle: Weka upya akiba ya mgao wa kufahamu
settings.resetAwareQuotaCacheDesc: Huweka akiba ya telemetry ya upendeleo kwa uagizaji wa kufahamu upya pekee. Nafasi ya ndege ya awali bado inalinda maombi. 0/0 huendelea kuleta moja kwa moja.
settings.vercelRelayWarning: Onyo: Tokeni ya utumaji ya Vercel inahitajika. Tokeni hii itatumika tu kuunda relay isiyo na seva na haitahifadhiwa kamwe na OmniRoute.
settings.vercelRelayFreeTierNote: Relay ni ncha nyepesi za proksi zilizotumwa kwenye kiwango cha bure cha Vercel ili kupita vizuizi vya mtandao/eneo la karibu.
settings.denoRelayWarning: Onyo: Tokeni ya shirika ya Deno Deploy inahitajika. Tokeni hii itatumika tu kuunda programu ya relay na haitahifadhiwa kamwe na OmniRoute.
settings.denoRelayTokenLabel: Tokeni ya Shirika ya Deno Deploy
settings.denoRelayFreeTierNote: Deno Deploy v2 inaendeshwa kwenye mtandao wa makali wa kimataifa. Kiwango cha bure: maombi milioni 1 & trafiki ya nje ya 100GiB kwa mwezi, hakuna kikomo cha CPU kwa kila ombi, hadi programu 20 zinazotumika & vikoa 50 vilivyogeuzwa kukufaa.
settings.cloudflareRelayWarning: Inatuma Cloudflare Worker ambayo inafanya ukarani wa maombi ya LLM kupitia mtandao wa makali wa Cloudflare — ikificha IP ya seva mwenyeji nyuma ya anwani thabiti za Cloudflare. Worker inalazimisha siri ya uthibitishaji ya mara moja ili URL ya umma ya workers.dev isiweze kutumiwa tena kama relay wazi.
settings.cloudflareRelayTokenHowto: Unda tokeni ya API chini ya Wasifu Wangu -> Tokeni za API -> Unda Tokeni -> Tokeni Maalum -> Akaunti / Maandishi ya Workers / Hariri.
settings.cloudflareRelayAccountIdHint: Inapatikana upande wa kulia wa ukurasa wa muhtasari wa dashibodi ya Cloudflare.
settings.cloudflareRelayApiTokenHint: Inahitaji ruhusa ya 'Maandishi ya Workers: Hariri'. Tokeni inatumika tu wakati wa kutuma na haihifadhiwi kamwe.
settings.cloudflareRelayFreeTierNote: Kiwango cha bure: maombi 100,000/siku kwa kila akaunti ya Cloudflare.
settings.cloudflareRelayCredsRequired: Kitambulisho cha Akaunti na Tokeni ya API zinahitajika
settings.modelLockoutPageDescription: Sanidi ni misimbo ipi ya hitilafu ya HTTP inayochochea kufungiwa kwa kila model na udhibiti tabia ya muda wa kutulia (cooldown).
settings.modelLockoutLoadFailed: Imeshindwa kupakia mipangilio ya kufungiwa kwa model
settings.modelLockoutSaveFailed: Imeshindwa kuhifadhi mipangilio ya kufungiwa kwa model
settings.modelLockoutLoading: Inapakia mipangilio ya kufungiwa kwa model...
settings.modelLockoutBaseRangeError: Muda wa Msingi wa Kutulia (Base Cooldown) lazima uwe kati ya 5,000ms na 600,000ms
settings.modelLockoutMaxRangeError: Kikomo cha Muda wa Kutulia (Max Cooldown) lazima kiwe kati ya 5,000ms na 3,600,000ms
settings.modelLockoutOrderError: Kikomo cha Muda wa Kutulia lazima kiwe kikubwa kuliko au sawa na Muda wa Msingi wa Kutulia
settings.modelLockoutStepsRangeError: Hatua za Juu za Kurudi Nyuma (Max Backoff Steps) lazima ziwe kati ya 0 na 20
settings.modelLockoutEnabledDescription: Inapowezeshwa, model zinazofeli kwa misimbo ya hitilafu iliyosanidiwa hufungiwa kwa muda ili kuzuia vitanzi vya kujaribu tena.
settings.modelLockoutErrorCodesDescription: Misimbo ya hali ya HTTP inayochochea kufungiwa kwa model. Andika msimbo na ubonyeze Ongeza, au chagua kutoka kwenye mapendekezo.
settings.modelLockoutBaseCooldownDescription: Muda wa kwanza wa kutulia katika milisekunde kabla ya model kujaribiwa tena.
settings.modelLockoutMaxCooldownDescription: Kikomo cha muda wa kutulia katika milisekunde. Huzuia kufungiwa kwa muda mrefu kupita kiasi.
settings.modelLockoutExponentialBackoffDescriptio: Inapowezeshwa, kila kufeli mtawalia kunaongeza muda wa kutulia kwa kipeo (exponentially).
settings.modelLockoutMaxBackoffStepsDescription: Idadi ya juu ya hatua za kujirudisha kabla ya muda wa kutulia kuacha kuongezeka. Kikomo cha Juu cha Kutulia hufikiwa kwanza katika usanidi mwingi, na kufanya hili kuwa dari ya usalama wakati Kikomo cha Juu cha Kutulia kinapoongezwa.
settings.disableSessionStickinessDesc: Mchanganyiko wa Round-robin na wa nasibu huzungusha hadi muunganisho tofauti kwenye kila ombi badala ya kubakiza mazungumzo yote kwenye muunganisho mmoja kupitia hashi ya ujumbe wa kwanza. Wacha ikiwa imezimwa ili kuhifadhi matokeo ya kache ya haraka kwa soga za zamu nyingi. Mipangilio mbadala ya kila mchanganyiko ina kipaumbele.

contextRtk.title: RTK Engine
contextRtk.description: Command-aware compression for tool output, terminal logs and build results.
contextRtk.filterCatalogDesc: Vichujio vya pato vinavyopatikana kulingana na kategoria
contextRtk.guidedConfigDesc: Rekebisha jinsi RTK inavyochuja pato lako la mwisho
contextRtk.pasteOutput: Paste tool output to test filtering...
contextRtk.previewEmpty: Run a sample to preview RTK output.
contextRtk.masterSwitchOffAlert: Swichi kuu ya Kifaa cha Kuokoa Tokeni (Token Saver) imezimwa — mipangilio hii haitaathiri maombi hadi uwashe kutoka kwenye ukurasa wa Endpoint.
contextRtk.tooltipDedup: Jinsi ya kuondoa mistari iliyorudiwa kwa ukali.
contextRtk.tooltipMaxChars: Upeo wa herufi kwa kila pato.
contextRtk.tooltipMaxLines: Upeo wa mistari ya kuweka kutoka kwa pato la amri. Ziada hupunguzwa.
contextRtk.learnDiscoverDesc: Chimba matokeo ya amri zako yaliyonaswa (uhifadhi wa Matokeo Ghafi lazima uwe umewashwa) ili kupendekeza vichujio vipya vya RTK. Ni mapendekezo tu — unayakagua na kuyahifadhi.
contextRtk.discoverEmpty: Hakuna kelele inayorudiwa iliyopatikana. Wezesha uhifadhi wa Matokeo Ghafi na uendeshe amri chache kwanza.
contextRtk.learnEmpty: Hakuna pendekezo bado. Andika amri uliyowahi kuendesha na uchanganue.
contextRtk.suggestionError: Imeshindwa kupakia mapendekezo. Angalia uthibitishaji wa usimamizi na ujaribu tena.

compressionEngineConfig.panelPointerPrefix: Washa au uzime tabaka hili na uweke kiwango chake katika
compressionEngineConfig.panelPointerSuffix: . Ukurasa huu unahariri usanidi wake wa kina pekee.
compressionEngineConfig.globalSettingsOnly: Tabaka hili limedhibitiwa na mipangilio ya jumla; hakuna ubatilishaji wa kila injini wa kuhifadhi hapa bado.
compressionEngineConfig.previewSample: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. Huu ni ujumbe wa mfano unaotumiwa kuhakiki mgandamizo. Una maandishi ya kutosha kuonyesha uhifadhi wa tokeni wenye maana.

headroom.name: Headroom SmartCrusher
headroom.description: Ushindiliaji wa jedwali usio na upotezaji wa safu za JSON zenye muundo sawa zenye vialamisho dhahiri vya idadi ya safu.

session-dedup.name: Session Dedup
session-dedup.description: Uondoaji wa nakala za block za zamu tofauti zenye vialamisho vya maudhui vinavyoweza kurejeshwa.

ccr.name: CCR
ccr.description: Vialamisho vya urejeshaji vinavyolenga maudhui kwa ajili ya block za muktadha zinazorudiwa.

ultra.name: Ultra

contextCombos.title: Compression Combos
contextCombos.description: Define how engines are combined for different routing scenarios.
contextCombos.name: Name
contextCombos.hubDescription: Chagua wasifu gani wa mgandamizo unaoendeshwa kimataifa.
contextCombos.explanationIntro: Mgandamizo hupunguza tokeni na gharama kwa kuandika upya historia kabla ya kutumwa kwa mtoa huduma huku ukihifadhi maana.
contextCombos.explanationActiveProfile: Wasifu unaotumika: huchagua wasifu gani wa mgandamizo unaoendeshwa kimataifa — Chaguomsingi inayotokana na paneli au mojawapo ya michanganyiko ya majina uliyohifadhi.
contextCombos.explanationDefault: Chaguomsingi (kutoka kwenye paneli): inayotokana na swichi kuu na swichi za kila injini unazozisanidi kwenye Mipangilio ya Mgandamizo.
contextCombos.explanationNamedCombos: Michanganyiko yenye majina: bomba zilizohifadhiwa unazozijenga katika kihariri cha michanganyiko yenye majina. Kuchagua moja huifanya kuwa wasifu unaotumika kwa kila ombi.
contextCombos.explanationPreview: Hakiki: inaonyesha injini zipi zinazoendeshwa na wasifu unaotumika, kwa mlolongo.
contextCombos.activeProfileDescription: Chagua ni wasifu gani wa mgandamizo unaoendeshwa kimataifa — Chaguomsingi inayotokana na paneli au mchanganyiko uliohifadhiwa wenye jina.
contextCombos.contextEditingDescription: Huruhusu mtoa huduma kufuta vizuizi vya zamani vya matumizi ya zana upande wa seva, bila kuandika upya ujumbe.
contextCombos.contextEditingNote: Kwa sasa inapatikana kwa Claude (Anthropic) pekee. Hali hii imekabidhiwa: mtoa huduma hufuta vizuizi vya zamani vya matumizi ya zana upande wa seva — hatuandiki upya ujumbe. Haiathiri watoa huduma wengine.
contextCombos.namedCombosDescription: Hifadhi bomba tofauti na uziweke kwenye michanganyiko mahususi ya kuelekeza.
contextCombos.nameRequired: Weka jina la mchanganyiko kabla ya kuhifadhi.
contextCombos.pipelineRequired: Ongeza angalau hatua moja ya bomba kabla ya kuhifadhi.
