omniglyph.description: Mgandamizo wa muktadha-kama-picha. Hutoa kidokezo cha mfumo, nyaraka za zana, na historia mnene kama kurasa ndogo za PNG ambazo Claude Fable 5 husoma badala ya maandishi. Tokeni za picha hutozwa kulingana na vipimo badala ya herufi, kwa hivyo kizuizi kilichogeuzwa hugharimu takriban mara 10 chini. Njia ya moja kwa moja ya Anthropic pekee.

economics.imageTokens: tokeni za picha kwa ajili ya ukurasa wa 1568×728 (takriban herufi 28k)

omniglyph.realRender: Utoaji halisi wa herufi {characters, number} za nyaraka za zana zilizosongamana — si mockup.
omniglyph.gatesDescription: Fail-closed: kila lango lazima lipite, vinginevyo ombi linapita bila kuguswa (kila ruko hurekodiwa kama skip:<reason>).

model.label: Modeli
model.why: Ni Fable 5 pekee inayosoma kurasa zilizosongamana kwa usahihi wa 100% (iliyopimwa, n=30). GPT-5.5 na Gemini 2.5 Flash zimezuiwa.

transport.label: Usafirishaji
transport.why: Vijumlishi vinasampuli upya picha na kuharibu usomaji — ni njia ya moja kwa moja pekee ndiyo yenye mamlaka.

format.label: Umbizo
format.why: Bodi lazima itumie umbizo la Claude na haipaswi kamwe kuweka jukumu la mfumo (system role) ndani ya ujumbe.

profitable.label: Yenye Faida
profitable.why: Lango la gharama la kiraka halisi cha 28px huamua kwa kila ombi; maandishi madogo au ya nadra yanapita bila kuguswa.

omniglyph.enableDescription: Inajiendesha mwishoni mwa mrundikano (baada ya RTK/Caveman kusafisha maandishi, OmniGlyph inabadilisha yaliyobaki kuwa picha) na pia inajiendesha yenyewe kupitia hali ya omniglyph. Huu ni uhakiki na inabaki imezimwa kwa chaguomsingi hadi uthibitishaji wa mwisho hadi mwisho ukamilike.

embeddedServices.title: Huduma Zilizopachikwa
embeddedServices.description: Injini za ndani zinazosimamiwa kulingana na mahitaji — CLIProxyAPI, 9Router, Mux, na Bifrost. Zinapatikana kwenye loopback pekee.
embeddedServices.externalDescription: OmniRoute imepata 9Router kwenye {host}:{port}. Mzunguko wake wa maisha, kumbukumbu (logs), visasisho, na ufunguo wa huduma vinaendelea kusimamiwa na usakinishaji wa nje.
embeddedServices.apiKeyDescription: Ufunguo unaotumiwa na OmniRoute kuthibitisha na {name}
embeddedServices.keyRotated: Ufunguo umezungushwa — {name} imeanzishwa tena ili kutumia ufunguo mpya
embeddedServices.keyAutoHide: Ufunguo utafichwa kiotomatiki baada ya sekunde 30.
embeddedServices.revealConfirm: Kufichua ufunguo wa API kutawekwa kwenye kumbukumbu za ukaguzi. Endelea?
embeddedServices.install9RouterDescription: Inapakua na kusakinisha 9Router kupitia npm. Inahitaji takriban MB 500 za nafasi kwenye diski.

preview.lite: Respond concise. Preserve technical terms, code, errors, URLs, and identifiers.
preview.full: Respond terse and compact. Preserve all technical substance.
preview.ultra: Respond ultra terse with common technical abbreviations. Preserve exact symbols.

translator.title: Translator
translator.metaDescription: Debug, test, and visualize API format translations between providers
translator.modeDescriptionPlayground: Paste any API request body and see how OmniRoute translates it between provider formats (OpenAI ↔ Claude ↔ Gemini ↔ Responses API)
translator.modeDescriptionChatTester: Send real chat requests through OmniRoute and inspect the full round-trip: input, translated request, provider response, and translated output.
translator.modeDescriptionTestBench: Run predefined scenarios and compare compatibility across providers and models.
translator.modeDescriptionLiveMonitor: Watch translation events in real time as requests flow through OmniRoute.
translator.modeDescriptionFallback: Debug, test, and visualize how OmniRoute translates API requests between providers.
translator.eventsAppearHint: Translation events appear here as requests flow through OmniRoute. Use any of these methods to generate events:
translator.inMemoryNote: Note: Events are stored in-memory and reset when the server restarts.
translator.formatConverterDescription: Paste or type a JSON request body. The translator will auto-detect the source format and convert it to the target format. Use this to debug how OmniRoute translates requests between formats (OpenAI ↔ Claude ↔ Gemini ↔ Responses API).
translator.autoFeaturesTitle: Nini OmniRoute hufanya moja kwa moja
translator.featureReasoningCacheDesc: Huingiza upya reasoning_content kwa miundo ya modi ya kufikiri (DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2, Qwen) wateja wanapoiondoa kwenye historia ya mazungumzo.
translator.featureSchemaCoercionDesc: Hurekebisha miundo ya zana iliyovunjika: huongeza Sifa za ziada zinazokosekana, husafisha maelezo marefu, hurekebisha vitu vilivyowekwa kwenye viota.
translator.featureRoleNormalizationDesc: Msanidi wa Ramani→mfumo kwa malengo yasiyo ya OpenAI. Mfumo wa Ramani→mtumiaji wa miundo ambayo haiauni jukumu la mfumo.
translator.featureToolCallIds: Kurekebisha Kitambulisho cha Simu ya Zana
translator.featureToolCallIdsDesc: Huzalisha vitambulisho vya kipekee vya tool_call inapokosekana. Inasawazisha hadi umbizo la chati 9 kwa watoa huduma kama vile Mistral.
translator.featureMissingToolResponseDesc: Huingiza ujumbe_matokeo tupu wateja wanapotuma simu_za_bila majibu yanayolingana.
translator.featureThinkingBudgetDesc: Inasimamia usanidi wa kufikiria kiotomatiki. Huondoa vigezo vya kufikiri wakati ujumbe wa mwisho hautokani na mtumiaji.
translator.featureDirectPaths: Njia za Tafsiri za moja kwa moja
translator.featureDirectPathsDesc: Baadhi ya jozi za umbizo (Claude→Gemini) zina vifasiri vya moja kwa moja ambavyo vinakwepa kitovu cha OpenAI, na hivyo kutoa matokeo sahihi zaidi.
translator.featureImageMappingDesc: Hutafsiri kanuni za vipimo vya picha kati ya miundo ya API (k.m., viwango vya maelezo ya OpenAI → vipimo vya Gemini).
translator.inputPlaceholder: Paste a request body here or select a template below...
translator.templateLoadHint: Template loads the request in {format} format. Change Source Format to load in a different format.
translator.testBenchDescription: Run predefined scenarios (Simple Chat, Tool Calling, etc.) to verify translation and provider compatibility. Select a source format and target provider, then run all tests to see a compatibility percentage. Use this to find which features work across providers.

translator.conceptHowItWorksBody: Programu yako hutuma ombi katika mfumo wake yenyewe. Mtafsiri hutambua mfumo huo, huugeuza kupitia OpenAI kama kitovu cha mpito (au moja kwa moja mtafsiri wa moja kwa moja anapopatikana), huutuma kwa mtoa huduma aliyechaguliwa, na kurudisha jibu lililogeuzwa tena kuwa mfumo wa programu yako.

translator.advancedCompressionSubtitle: Kadiria uokoaji wa tokeni kwenye hali tofauti za mfinyazo.

landing.heroDescription: AI endpoint proxy with web dashboard - A JavaScript port of CLIProxyAPI. Works seamlessly with Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cline, RooCode, and other CLI tools.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to manage your AI infrastructure in one place, built for scale.
landing.featureUnifiedEndpointDesc: Access all providers via a single standard API URL.
landing.featureEasySetupDesc: Get up and running in minutes with npx command.
landing.featureModelFallbackDesc: Automatically switch providers on failure or high latency.
landing.featureUsageTrackingDesc: Detailed analytics and cost monitoring across all models.
landing.featureOAuthApiKeysDesc: Securely manage credentials in one vault.
landing.featureCloudSyncDesc: Sync your configurations across devices instantly.
landing.featureCliSupportDesc: Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cline, Cursor, and more.
landing.featureDashboardDesc: Visual dashboard for real-time traffic analysis.
landing.howItWorksDescription: Data flows seamlessly from your application through our intelligent routing layer to the best provider for the job.
landing.howItWorksStep1Description: Your requests start from your favorite tools or our unified SDK. Just change the base URL.
landing.howItWorksStep2Description: Our engine analyzes the prompt, checks provider health, and routes for lowest latency or cost.
landing.howItWorksStep3Description: The request is fulfilled by OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or others instantly.
landing.getStartedDescription: Install OmniRoute, configure your providers via web dashboard, and start routing AI requests.
landing.installStepDescription: Run npx command to start the server instantly
landing.openDashboardStepDescription: Configure providers and API keys via web interface
landing.configureProvidersNote: 📝 Configure providers in dashboard or use environment variables
landing.footerTagline: The unified endpoint for AI generation. Connect, route, and manage your AI providers with ease.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to Simplify Your AI Infrastructure?
landing.ctaDescription: Join developers who are streamlining their AI integrations with OmniRoute. Open source and free to start.

docs.deploySetupText: Usakinishaji wa hatua kwa hatua, usanidi wa mazingira, na mapitio ya mara ya kwanza ya OmniRoute.
docs.deployElectronText: Endesha OmniRoute kama programu asilia ya eneo-kazi kwenye Windows, macOS, na Linux.
docs.deployDockerText: Usambazaji wa vyombo na Docker Compose; tayari kwa mkusanyiko wa uzalishaji na Kubernetes.
docs.deployVmText: Mwenyeji mwenyewe kwenye Linux VM yoyote. Inajumuisha kitengo cha mfumo, mzunguko wa kumbukumbu, na zana za kuhifadhi nakala.
docs.deployFlyText: Sambaza hadi Fly.io edge wakati wa utekelezaji kwa fly.toml moja na amri moja ya kusambaza.
docs.deployPwaText: Sakinisha OmniRoute kama Programu Inayoendelea ya Wavuti kwenye vivinjari vya Android, iOS na eneo-kazi.
docs.deployTermuxText: Run OmniRoute headless on Android via Termux. Access the dashboard from your mobile browser.
docs.featureRoutingText: Route requests to 30+ AI providers through a single OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Supports chat, responses, audio, and image APIs.
docs.featureCombosText: Create model combos with fallback chains and balancing strategies: round-robin, priority, random, least-used, and cost-optimized.
docs.featureUsageText: Real-time token counting, cost calculation per provider/model, and detailed usage breakdown by API key and account.
docs.featureAnalyticsText: Visual analytics with charts for requests, tokens, errors, latency, costs, and model popularity over time.
docs.featureHealthText: Live health checks, provider status, circuit breaker states, and automatic rate limit detection with exponential backoff.
docs.featureCliText: Manage IDE configurations, export/import backups, discover codex profiles, and configure settings from the dashboard.
docs.featureSecurityText: API key authentication, IP filtering, prompt injection guard, domain policies, session management, and audit logging.
docs.featureCloudSyncText: Sync your configuration to Cloudflare Workers for remote access with encrypted credentials and automatic failover.
docs.useCaseSingleEndpointText: Point clients to one base URL and route by model prefix (for example: gh/, cc/, kr/, openai/).
docs.useCaseFallbackTitle: Fallback and model switching with combos
docs.useCaseFallbackText: Create combo models in Dashboard and keep client config stable while providers rotate internally.
docs.useCaseUsageVisibilityText: Track tokens and cost by provider, account, and API key in Usage and Analytics tabs.
docs.clientCursorBullet2: OAuth connection - login from the Providers page.
docs.clientWindsurfBullet1: Use OmniRoute as an OpenAI-compatible base URL and keep explicit provider prefixes for deterministic routing.
docs.clientWindsurfBullet2: Point models to `/v1/chat/completions` for general traffic and preserve `/v1/responses` for Codex-style flows.
docs.clientWindsurfBullet3: Use Dashboard -> CLI Tools for a ready-made Windsurf configuration guide.
docs.clientClineBullet1: Cline works best with explicit provider/model prefixes so the router never has to guess the backend.
docs.clientClineBullet2: Use `/v1/chat/completions` for general models and reuse the same OmniRoute base URL across different accounts.
docs.clientClineBullet3: Use the Providers dashboard to validate OAuth/API key before debugging Cline runtime issues.
docs.clientKimiBullet1: Use OmniRoute as a stable base URL while rotating accounts or provider combos underneath.
docs.clientKimiBullet2: Prefer prefixed models in coding flows so fallback and audit trail remain explicit.
docs.clientKimiBullet3: Use `/v1/responses` when you want native Responses-style routing for tool-using clients.
docs.protocolsDescription: OmniRoute exposes two operational protocols in addition to OpenAI-compatible APIs: MCP for tool execution and A2A for agent-to-agent workflows.
docs.protocolMcpDesc: Use MCP over stdio to let clients discover and call OmniRoute tools with audit visibility.
docs.protocolMcpStep2: Point your MCP client to stdio transport.
docs.protocolA2aDesc: Use A2A JSON-RPC to submit tasks synchronously or via SSE streaming.
docs.protocolTroubleshooting1: If MCP status is offline, verify the stdio process is running and heartbeat file is updating.
docs.protocolTroubleshooting2: If A2A tasks stay in `working`, inspect `/api/a2a/tasks/:id` and stream events for terminal state.
docs.protocolTroubleshooting3: Use `/dashboard/mcp` and `/dashboard/a2a` for operational controls and audit visibility.

docs.endpointRewriteModelsNote: Rewrite helper for model discovery without /v1.
docs.mgmtProxiesListNote: List saved proxy registry items (supports pagination).
docs.mgmtProxiesCreateNote: Create a reusable proxy item in the registry.
docs.mgmtProxiesHealthNote: Get 24h/rolling health metrics per saved proxy from proxy logs.

docs.mgmtAssignmentsListNote: List proxy assignments by scope, scope_id, or proxy_id.
docs.mgmtAssignmentsUpdateNote: Assign or clear proxy for global/provider/account/combo scope.
docs.mgmtLegacyMigrationNote: Import legacy proxyConfig maps into registry assignments.
docs.modelPrefixesDescriptionStart: Use the provider prefix before the model name to route to a specific provider. Example:
docs.troubleshootingModelRouting: If the client fails with model routing, use explicit provider/model (for example: gh/gpt-5.1-codex).
docs.troubleshootingAmbiguousModels: If you receive ambiguous model errors, pick a provider prefix instead of a bare model ID.
docs.troubleshootingCodexFamily: For GitHub Codex-family models, keep model as gh/codex-model; router selects /responses automatically.
docs.troubleshootingTestConnection: Use Dashboard > Providers > Test Connection before testing from IDEs or external clients.
docs.troubleshootingCircuitBreaker: If a provider shows circuit breaker open, wait for the cooldown or check Health page for details.
docs.troubleshootingOAuth: For OAuth providers, re-authenticate if tokens expire. Check the provider card status indicator.

legal.privacyMetadataDescription: Privacy policy for the OmniRoute AI API proxy router.
legal.termsMetadataDescription: Terms of service for the OmniRoute AI API proxy router.
legal.privacySection1Text: OmniRoute is designed as a local-first application. All data processing and storage occurs entirely on your machine. There is no centralized server collecting your information.
legal.privacyDataStoredIn: The following data is stored locally in
legal.privacyDataProviderConfigurationsDesc: connection URLs, provider types, and priority settings
legal.privacyDataApiKeysDesc: encrypted and stored locally for authenticating with AI providers
legal.privacyDataUsageLogsDesc: request counts, token usage, model names, timestamps, and response times
legal.privacyDataApplicationSettingsDesc: theme preferences, routing strategy, and combo configurations
legal.privacySection3Text: OmniRoute does not collect telemetry, analytics, or crash reports. No data is sent to us or any third party. Your usage patterns, API calls, and configurations remain entirely private.
legal.privacySection4Text: When you make API calls through OmniRoute, your requests are forwarded to the AI providers you have configured (for example: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google). These providers have their own privacy policies that govern how they handle your data. Please review:
legal.privacySection5Text: If you enable the optional cloud sync feature, provider configurations and API keys may be transmitted to a configured cloud endpoint. This feature is disabled by default and requires explicit opt-in.
legal.privacyLoggingIntro: Request logs can be configured through the dashboard settings. You can:
legal.privacySection7TextStart: Since all data is stored locally, you have full control. You can delete your data at any time by removing the
legal.privacySection7TextEnd: directory or using the database backup and restore features in the dashboard.
legal.termsSection1Text: OmniRoute is a local-first AI API proxy router that operates entirely on your machine. It routes requests to multiple AI providers with load balancing, failover, and usage tracking.
legal.termsResponsibilityApiKeys: You are solely responsible for managing your own API keys and credentials for third-party AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.).
legal.termsResponsibilityCompliance: You must comply with the terms of service of each AI provider whose API you access through OmniRoute.
legal.termsResponsibilitySecurity: You are responsible for the security of your local OmniRoute installation, including setting a password and restricting network access.
legal.termsSection3Text: OmniRoute acts as an intermediary proxy. API calls sent to OmniRoute are translated and forwarded to your configured AI providers. OmniRoute does not modify the content of your requests or responses beyond the necessary protocol translation.
legal.termsDataStoredLocally: All data is stored locally on your machine in a SQLite database.
legal.termsNoTransmission: OmniRoute does not transmit any data to external servers unless you explicitly enable cloud sync features.
legal.termsDataLocationText: Usage logs, API keys, and configuration are stored in
legal.termsSection5Text: OmniRoute is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. We are not responsible for any costs incurred through API usage, service disruptions, or data loss. Always maintain backups of your configuration.
legal.termsSection6Text: OmniRoute is open-source software. You are free to inspect, modify, and distribute it under the terms of its license.

cache.description: Monitor provider prompt cache efficiency and local semantic response reuse.

cache.semanticCacheSectionDesc: OmniRoute's own deterministic response cache. When enabled, repeated non-streaming temperature=0 requests can be served locally without hitting the upstream provider.

This screen lets you design and visualize the quota split; real enforcement will land in a future iteration with DB persistence and upstream call interception.

Skrini hii hukuruhusu kubuni na kuona taswira ya mgawanyiko wa sehemu; utekelezaji halisi utatua katika marudio ya siku zijazo na usugu wa DB na uzuiaji wa simu wa juu.
quotaShare.conceptTitle: Jinsi Ugawanaji wa Viwango unavyofanya kazi
quotaShare.conceptIntro: Ugawanaji wa Viwango hugawanya kiwango cha mtoa huduma kati ya funguo nyingi za API kwa kutumia usawa wa kuhifadhi kazi: kila ufunguo hupokea sehemu inayolingana lakini unaweza kukopa kutoka kwenye salio la bure bila kuzidi kikomo cha kimataifa.
quotaShare.conceptFairShare: Ugawanaji wa usawa: kila ufunguo hupokea kiwango kinacholingana na uzito uliosanidiwa
quotaShare.conceptBorrowing: Kukopa: funguo zinaweza kutumia salio la bure kutoka kwa zingine bila kukiuka kikomo
quotaShare.conceptGlobalCap: Kikomo kikuu cha kimataifa: kikomo kamili cha mtoa huduma hakizidiwi kamwe
quotaShare.conceptWindows: Vipindi: saa 5, kila saa, kila siku, kila wiki, kila mwezi — kila kimoja kinafuatiliwa kivyake
quotaShare.conceptKeyHowTitle: Kuwezesha ufunguo kwa ajili ya kiwango
quotaShare.conceptKeyHowDesc: Unda ufunguo kama kawaida katika Funguo za API — unaonekana kwenye hatua ya ufunguo ya kisanduku cha usaidizi kiotomatiki. Weka alama ya tiki kwenye 'Exclusive' hapo ili kuufanya kuwa wa kiwango pekee. Hakuna hatua tofauti ya kuwezesha.
quotaShare.conceptExclusiveDesc: Ufunguo wa kipekee unaona/unatumia tu modeli za quotaShared-* za kundi hilo — modeli nyingine zote zimefichwa kutoka kwa /v1/models zake na kuzuiliwa.
quotaShare.migratedFromLocalStorageNotice: Makundi yamehamishwa kwa mafanikio kutoka kwa localStorage.
quotaShare.wizardStep1Subtitle: Chagua akaunti ya mtoa huduma ambayo kundi hili litashiriki kiwango chake, weka jina na sera mbadala.
quotaShare.wizardStep2Subtitle: Bainisha vipimo vya mpango wa kiwango (kipimo, kipindi cha muda, kikomo) kwa muunganisho uliochaguliwa. Acha bila kubadilisha ili kuweka mipangilio ya sasa.
quotaShare.wizardStep3Subtitle: Gawa funguo za API kwenye kundi hili kwa ugawaji wa % ya uzito na vikomo vya hiari.
quotaShare.wizardDimensionsEditedNotice: Vipimo vimehaririwa — vitahifadhiwa kama ubatilishaji wa mwongozo wakati kidimbwi kinaundwa.
quotaShare.wizardExclusiveHint: Inapowezeshwa, funguo hizi za API zitaruhusiwa tu kutumia miundo ya mtandaoni ya kidimbwi hiki (upatanisho wa allowedQuotas hutumiwa wakati wa kuhifadhi).
quotaShare.wizardPreviewLabel: Hakikisho la majina ya miundo ya mtandaoni
quotaShare.wizardAdditionalConnectionsNote: Miunganisho ya ziada inatumia viwango vyao vya msingi vya katalogi (vinaweza kuhaririwa baadaye).
quotaShare.wizardSingleProviderNote: Kidimbwi kinatumia mtoa huduma mmoja tu
quotaShare.groupAllocationNote: Ugawaji unatumika kwa vidimbwi vyote kwenye kikundi hiki kupitia safu ya mgao iliyoshirikiwa.
quotaShare.endpointsHint: Ita miundo hii ya mtandaoni kwa ufunguo wowote uliogawiwa — urutishaji + mgao unashughulikiwa kwa kila kikundi.
quotaShare.betaText: Quota Share inafanya kazi lakini hitilafu zinatarajiwa. Umepata moja? Tafadhali iripoti.

agentBridge.subtitle: Tumia mawakala wa IDE na mifano ya OmniRoute — hakuna usanidi unaohitajika
agentBridge.riskBannerBody: AgentBridge hunasa trafiki ya HTTPS kutoka kwa mawakala wa IDE. Kwa kuwezesha, unakubali uwajibikaji wa kufuata masharti ya huduma ya kila wakala. Usitumie kamwe kwenye vifaa au mitandao ambapo ukaguzi wa TLS umepigwa marufuku.

agentBridge.bypassSectionDesc: Wenyeji wanaolingana na ruwaza hizi hupitishwa moja kwa moja (bila usimbaji fiche wa TLS). Chaguo-msingi ni pamoja na banks.gov, na SSO ya ushirika.
agentBridge.bypassUserLabel: Ruwaza maalum za kupita (moja kwa kila mstari, glob au regex)
agentBridge.noAgentsMatch: Hakuna mawakala wanaolingana na kichujio cha sasa
agentBridge.investigatingNotice: Wakala huyu anachunguzwa. Kompyuta wenyeji na eneo la API bado vinathibitishwa. Usanidi utapatikana mara tu API ya upstream itakapowekewa kumbukumbu.

agentBridge.riskNoticeBody: AgentBridge itazuia na kunasa trafiki ya HTTPS kutoka kwa wakala huyu kwa kuelekeza upya seva mwenyeji wake wa API kupitia DNS. Wezesha tu ikiwa unakubali uwajibikaji wa kufuata masharti ya huduma ya wakala na sera zozote za mtandao zinazohusika.

omni-auth.name: Uthibitishaji
omni-auth.description: Dhibiti uthibitishaji wa ufunguo wa API na tokeni za kipindi. Anzia hapa ili kuthibitisha maombi kupitia tokeni ya Bearer, kupata vidakuzi vya kipindi, na kusanidi mahitaji ya kuingia kwenye API ya OmniRoute.

omni-providers.name: Watoa Huduma
omni-providers.description: Dhibiti miunganisho ya watoa huduma, funguo za API, mtiririko wa OAuth, na majaribio ya muunganisho kupitia REST API. Orodhesha, ongeza, sasisha, ondoa, na ujaribu miunganisho ya watoa huduma wa AI (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, na mengine 160+).

omni-models.name: Mifano
omni-models.description: Uliza mifano ya AI inayopatikana kwenye watoa huduma wote waliosanidiwa. Orodhesha mifano, suluhisha majina mbadala ya mifano, na vinjari orodha kamili ya mifano ikijumuisha lahaja maalum za watoa huduma.

omni-combos-routing.name: Mchanganyiko na Urutishaji
omni-combos-routing.description: Unda na udhibiti mchanganyiko wa urutishaji kwa kutumia mikakati 14 (kipaumbele, uzito, round-robin, Auto-combo, n.k.). Sanidi minyororo ya dharura, jaribu matokeo ya urutishaji, na upate vipimo vya mchanganyiko.

omni-api-keys.name: Funguo za API
omni-api-keys.description: Unda, orodhesha, zungusha, na ubatilishe funguo za API za OmniRoute. Dhibiti upeo wa kila ufunguo, vikomo vya matumizi, na muda wa kuisha. Funguo hudhibiti ufikiaji wa miisho yote ya seva mbadala na usimamizi.

omni-usage-logs.name: Matumizi na Logi
omni-usage-logs.description: Fikia logi za kina za simu na uchanganuzi wa matumizi. Chuja kulingana na mtoa huduma, mfano, muda, hali, na gharama. Hamisha logi na ujumuishe matumizi ya tokeni kwenye miunganisho yote.

omni-budget.name: Bajeti na Vikomo vya Viwango
omni-budget.description: Sanidi vikomo vya matumizi, nafasi za tokeni, na sera za kikomo cha kasi kwa kila ufunguo wa API au ulimwenguni kote. Kagua matumizi ya sasa na utekeleze udhibiti wa gharama kwa watoa huduma wote.

omni-settings.name: Mipangilio
omni-settings.description: Soma na usasishe mipangilio ya kimataifa ya programu: vidokezo vya mfumo, bajeti ya kufikiria (thinking budget), vichujio vya IP, sheria za upakiaji, chaguo-msingi za mchanganyiko, na usanidi unaohitaji kuingia.

omni-proxies.name: Usanidi wa Seva Mbadala
omni-proxies.description: Sanidi seva mbadala za HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS kwa maombi ya watoa huduma wa juu. Weka sheria za seva mbadala za kila mtoa huduma au za kimataifa, jaribu muunganisho, na udhibiti mzunguko wa seva mbadala.

omni-cache.name: Kache
omni-cache.description: Dhibiti kache ya majibu ya LLM. Angalia takwimu za kache, futa maingizo, sanidi sera za TTL, na udhibiti vizingiti vya uhifadhi wa kache wa ufanano wa kisemantiki.

omni-compression.name: Mgandamizo
omni-compression.description: Sanidi RTK (towe la amri), Caveman (nathari), na aina zilizorundikwa za mgandamizo. Dhibiti vifurushi vya lugha, sheria maalum, na jaribu mgandamizo wa kidokezo unaopunguza tokeni kwa 60–90%.

omni-context-rtk.name: Muktadha na RTK
omni-context-rtk.description: Sanidi vichujio vya RTK, sheria za uhandisi wa muktadha, na mipangilio ya kupitisha muktadha. Jaribu mgandamizo na sampuli halisi za kidokezo na udhibiti njia za ubadilishaji wa muktadha.

omni-resilience.name: Uhimili na Ufuatiliaji
omni-resilience.description: Fuatilia afya ya mtoa huduma, hali za kikatiza-mzunguko, vipimo vya kuchelewa vya p50/p95/p99, na arifa za ulinzi wa bajeti. Kagua vipindi vya kupoa kwa muunganisho na kufungiwa kwa mifano katika muda halisi.

omni-cli-tools.name: Zana za CLI
omni-cli-tools.description: Dhibiti miunganisho ya zana za CLI inayoonyeshwa kupitia API. Orodhesha, sanidi, na uitishe programu-jalizi za zana za CLI zinazoongeza wigo wa otomatiki wa OmniRoute.

omni-tunnels.name: Mifereji
omni-tunnels.description: Unda na udhibiti mifereji salama (ngrok, Cloudflare Tunnel, maalum) ili kufungua OmniRoute kwenye mtandao au kushiriki ufikiaji na ejenti wa mbali na mifumo ya CI (CI pipelines).

omni-sync-cloud.name: Usawazishaji wa Wingu
omni-sync-cloud.description: Sawazisha usanidi wa OmniRoute, miunganisho ya watoa huduma, na mipangilio kwenda/kutoka kwenye uhifadhi wa wingu. Dhibiti uthibitishaji wa wafanyakazi wa wingu (cloud workers) na shabaha za nakala rudufu za mbali.

omni-db-backups.name: Hifadhidata na Hifadhi Nakala
omni-db-backups.description: Anzisha nakala rudufu za mfumo, rejesha kutoka kwa faili za nakala rudufu, na udhibiti mzunguko wa maisha wa hifadhidata ya SQLite. Inasaidia mikakati ya kuuza nje, kuagiza, na picha za haraka zilizoongezeka (incremental snapshots).

omni-webhooks.name: Webhooks
omni-webhooks.description: Sajili, orodhesha, jaribu, na uondoe miisho ya webhook. Sanidi usajili wa matukio (request.completed, provider.error, budget.exceeded, n.k.) na udhibiti majaribio ya uwasilishaji.

omni-mcp.name: Seva ya MCP
omni-mcp.description: Unganisha kwenye seva ya MCP ya OmniRoute (zana 37, mifumo 3 ya usafirishaji: SSE/stdio/HTTP). Inajumuisha urutishaji, kache, mgandamizo, kumbukumbu, ujuzi, watoa huduma, na zana za ukaguzi kwenye upeo 16 wa ruhusa.

omni-agents-a2a.name: Ejenti na Itifaki ya A2A
omni-agents-a2a.description: Wasiliana na OmniRoute kupitia itifaki ya wakala-hadi-wakala ya JSON-RPC 2.0. Stadi 6 zilizojumuishwa za A2A: smart-routing, quota-management, provider-discovery, cost-analysis, health-report, list-capabilities.

omni-version-manager.name: Kidhibiti Toleo
omni-version-manager.description: Sakinisha, anzisha, simamisha, anzisha upya, na usasishe huduma zilizopachikwa (9Router, CLIProxyAPI). Fuatilia hali ya huduma, pata kumbukumbu za matukio (logs), na usanidi uanzishaji otomatiki kwa vituo vya huduma vya ndani pekee (local-only service endpoints).

omni-inference.name: Udadisi (Unaoendana na OpenAI)
omni-inference.description: Vituo vikuu vya udadisi vinavyoendana na OpenAI: chat completions, embeddings, picha, sauti (TTS/STT), moderations, rerank, na Responses API. Kiolesura kikuu cha ujumuishaji kwa mawakala wa AI.

cli-serve.name: CLI: Serve
cli-serve.description: Anzisha, simamisha, na uanzishe upya seva ya OmniRoute kutoka kwenye CLI. Dhibiti hali ya daemon, usanidi wa lango (port), urejeshaji otomatiki, ujumuishaji wa trei ya mfumo (system tray), na njia ya mkato ya kufungua dashibodi.

cli-health.name: CLI: Health
cli-health.description: Kagua hali ya seva, hali ya vijenzi, na vipimo vya moja kwa moja kutoka kwenye CLI. Endesha `health`, `health components`, na `health watch` kwa ajili ya dashibodi ya wakati halisi ya vikata mzunguko (circuit breakers) na hali ya mtoa huduma.

cli-providers.name: CLI: Providers
cli-providers.description: Dhibiti miunganisho ya watoa huduma kutoka kwenye CLI: orodhesha watoa huduma wanaopatikana/waliosanidiwa, ongeza, jaribu, jaribu-zote, thibitisha, zungusha funguo za API, na uangalie vipimo vya kila mtoa huduma.

cli-keys.name: CLI: API Keys
cli-keys.description: Unda, orodhesha, zungusha, na ubatilishe funguo za API za OmniRoute kutoka kwenye CLI. Dhibiti mtiririko wa OAuth kwa uthibitishaji wa mtoa huduma na ukague upeo na muda wa mwisho wa funguo.

cli-models.name: CLI: Models
cli-models.description: Uliza mifano ya AI inayopatikana, orodhesha lakabu za mifano, na vinjari katalogi kamili ya mifano kutoka kwenye CLI. Chuja kulingana na mtoa huduma, tafuta kwa uwezo, na usuluhishe anuwai za majina ya mifano.

cli-chat.name: CLI: Chat
cli-chat.description: Tuma ukamilishaji wa gumzo, tiririsha majibu, na uanzishe kipindi shirikishi cha REPL kutoka kwenye CLI. Inasaidia watoa huduma wote wa OmniRoute, uelekezaji mchanganyiko (combo routing), na usanidi wa mfumo wa kidokezo (system prompt).

cli-routing.name: CLI: Routing & Combos
cli-routing.description: Unda, orodhesha, sasisha, na ufute mchanganyiko wa uelekezaji (routing combos) kutoka kwenye CLI. Jaribu mikakati ya uelekezaji, kagua vipimo vya mchanganyiko, na usanidi minyororo ya dharura (fallback chains) kwa njia shirikishi.

cli-resilience.name: CLI: Resilience & Quotas
cli-resilience.description: Kagua na udhibiti hali za vikata mzunguko (circuit-breaker), muda wa kupumzika kwa muunganisho, mipaka ya viwango (quotas), na viwango vya kupunguza kasi (backoff levels) kutoka kwenye CLI. Weka upya watoa huduma waliokwama na usanidi vizingiti vya ustahimilivu.

cli-compression.name: CLI: Compression
cli-compression.description: Usanidi na ujaribu mbano wa kidokezo (prompt compression) kutoka kwenye CLI. Dhibiti vichungi vya RTK, sheria za Caveman, modi zilizopangwa za mbano, na uhakiki toleo la mbano kwa kutumia vidokezo halisi.

cli-contexts.name: CLI: Contexts & Sessions
cli-contexts.description: Dhibiti usanidi wa uhandisi wa muktadha (context engineering), seti za vichungi vya RTK, na vipindi vya mazungumzo kutoka kwenye CLI. Tuma mipangilio ya context-relay na ukague njia amilifu za muktadha.

cli-cost-usage.name: CLI: Cost & Usage
cli-cost-usage.description: Angalia uchanganuzi wa gharama, matumizi ya tokeni, na kumbukumbu za simu kutoka kwenye CLI. Chuja kulingana na mtoa huduma, mfano, au anuwai ya tarehe. Hamisha ripoti za matumizi na ukague matumizi ya kila muunganisho.

cli-mcp.name: CLI: MCP
cli-mcp.description: Kagua hali ya seva ya MCP, orodhesha zana na upeo uliosajiliwa, endesha miito ya zana, na udhibiti kumbukumbu za ukaguzi za MCP kutoka kwenye CLI.

cli-a2a.name: CLI: A2A Protocol
cli-a2a.description: Wasiliana na seva ya OmniRoute A2A kutoka kwenye CLI. Tuma majukumu, kagua historia ya utekelezaji wa stadi, na ujaribu itifaki ya wakala-hadi-wakala ya JSON-RPC 2.0 kwa njia shirikishi.

cli-tunnel.name: CLI: Tunnels
cli-tunnel.description: Anzisha na usimamishe miunganisho ya vichuguu (ngrok, Cloudflare, maalum) kutoka kwenye CLI. Kagua URL za vichuguu amilifu, usanidi uthibitishaji, na ujaribu uwezekano wa kufikiwa kutoka nje.

cli-backup-sync.name: CLI: Backup & Sync
cli-backup-sync.description: Hifadhi nakala na urejeshe data ya OmniRoute kutoka kwenye CLI. Anzisha picha za nakala za nyongeza (incremental snapshots), sawazisha kwenye hifadhi ya wingu, dhibiti ratiba za uhifadhi nakala, na urejeshe kutoka kwa faili za kumbukumbu.

cli-policy-audit.name: CLI: Policy & Audit
cli-policy-audit.description: Kagua kumbukumbu za ukaguzi, dhibiti sera za ufikiaji, angalia data ya telemetria, na uhakiki historia ya maombi kutoka kwenye CLI. Chuja kulingana na aina ya tukio, mtumiaji, au muda kwa ajili ya mtiririko wa kazi wa kufuata sheria.

cli-batches.name: CLI: Batches & Files
cli-batches.description: Wasilisha na ufuatilie kazi za udadisi wa makundi (batch inference) kutoka kwenye CLI. Pakia na udhibiti faili kwa ajili ya usindikaji wa makundi, pata matokeo, na uunganishe mifumo ya makundi na mitiririko ya kazi ya CI/CD.

cli-eval.name: CLI: Evals
cli-eval.description: Unda na uendeshe seti za tathmini, tazama maendeleo ya vipimo vya ulinganishaji ya moja kwa moja (live benchmark), angalia kadi za alama, linganisha utendaji wa mifano, na uunganishe uendeshaji wa tathmini (eval runs) na mitiririko ya kazi ya CI kutoka kwenye CLI.

cli-plugins-skills.name: CLI: Plugins, Skills & Memory
cli-plugins-skills.description: Dhibiti Omni Skills (orodhesha, sakinisha, jaribu, ondoa), programu-jalizi (unda, usanidi), na kumbukumbu ya kudumu (tafuta, ongeza, futa) kutoka kwenye CLI.

cli-setup.name: CLI: Setup & Config
cli-setup.description: Endesha usanidi wa kwanza, usanidi mipangilio ya kimataifa ya CLI, dhibiti vigezo vya mazingira (environment variables), kagua sasisho, na usanidi uanzishaji otomatiki kupitia amri za usanidi wa CLI.

config-codex-cli.name: Sanidi: Codex CLI
config-codex-cli.description: Mtiririko wa kazi wa wakala wa hatua kwa hatua ili kusanidi OpenAI Codex CLI kwenye mashine yoyote (Linux, macOS, Windows) kutumia OmniRoute kama mfumo wa nyuma unaoendana na OpenAI. Hugundua mfumo wa uendeshaji (OS) na shell, huandika config.toml na wasifu 7 zilizotajwa, huweka vigezo vya mazingira, na kuthibitisha usanidi.

omni-github-skills.name: Ugunduzi wa Stadi za GitHub
omni-github-skills.description: Tafuta, toa alama, kagua, na uagize stadi za wakala kutoka kwenye hazina za GitHub zilizo na SKILL.md, CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, na faili sawa za stadi za wakala. Gundua stadi za jamii katika zaidi ya kategoria 160 za watoa huduma, tathmini umuhimu kwa alama za kiheuristic, kagua programu hasidi au siri zilizowekwa moja kwa moja kwenye nambari (hardcoded secrets), na usakinishe kwenye saraka za wakala za Hermes, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, au OpenCode.

agentSkills.pageSubtitle: Fundisha wakala wako kuendesha OmniRoute — maeneo 22 ya API + familia 20 za CLI

agent.title: Stadi za Wakala — Zinazotoka Nje
agent.description: Agent Skills ni hati za SKILL.md zinazoweza kusomwa na mashine ambazo maajenti wa AI wa nje (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot…) huzipakua kutoka GitHub ili kujifunza jinsi ya kuendesha OmniRoute kupitia REST au CLI. Zinasomwa na ajenti, hazitekelezwi na OmniRoute.

omni.title: Omni Skills — Inbound
omni.description: Omni Skills ni zana za sanduku la majaribio (sandbox) ambazo OmniRoute huziingiza kwenye muktadha wa mfano kwenye kila ombi. Zinatekelezwa na OmniRoute, hazisomwi na ajenti.

whatIs.label: Ni nini

whatIs.omni: Zana zinazoweza kutekelezwa ambazo OmniRoute huziingiza kama zana kwenye maombi ya LLM

direction.label: Mwelekeo
direction.agent: Outbound — ajenti wa nje anajifunza kudhibiti OmniRoute
direction.omni: Inbound — OmniRoute inatoa zana kwa mifano inayopita kwake

executor.omni: OmniRoute yenyewe (inazuia tool_calls, sandbox ya Docker)

freeProviderRankingsPage.subtitle: Watoa huduma bora wa bure waliowekwa kwenye nafasi kulingana na alama za ELO za mifano kutoka kwenye ubao wa wanaoongoza wa Arena AI
freeProviderRankingsPage.emptyState: Hakuna nafasi zinazopatikana bado. Data ya ELO ya Arena husawazishwa wakati wa kuanza (kila siku) — angalia tena hivi karibuni, au anzisha usawazishaji wa mwongozo. Lemaza Usawazishaji wa ELO wa Arena kwenye Feature Flags au weka ARENA_ELO_SYNC_ENABLED=false ili kujiondoa.

discovery.subtitle: Chunguza watoa huduma kwa njia za ufikiaji wa bure/bila kikomo na ukague matokeo. Kujisajili kwa hiari, ya ndani pekee.

featureFlags.restartViewDescription: Flags hizi zitaanza kutumika tu baada ya seva kuanzishwa upya. Zibadilishe kama flag nyingine yoyote — mabadiliko yanahifadhiwa mara moja, lakini thamani mpya inasomwa tu wakati wa kuanza kwa mchakato. Tumia bango la Anzisha Upya Seva hapo juu ili kutumia.

REQUIRE_API_KEY.description: Hitaji ufunguo wa API kwa maombi yote yanayoingia.

INPUT_SANITIZER_ENABLED.description: Wezesha usafishaji wa data ya pembejeo kwa maombi yote.

INJECTION_GUARD_MODE.description: Weka modi ya ulinzi dhidi ya uingizaji wa maelekezo (prompt-injection).

PII_REDACTION_ENABLED.description: Ficha taarifa zinazoweza kumtambulisha mtu binafsi (PII) kutoka kwenye maombi.

PII_RESPONSE_SANITIZATION.description: Safisha taarifa zinazoweza kumtambulisha mtu binafsi (PII) kwenye majibu ya mtoa huduma.

PII_RESPONSE_SANITIZATION_MODE.description: Chagua jinsi PII kwenye majibu inavyoshughulikiwa: 'redact' huibadilisha, 'warn' huirekodi pekee, 'block' hukataa jibu, na 'off' huzima usafishaji.

OUTBOUND_SSRF_GUARD_ENABLED.description: Zuia maombi ya nje kwenda kwenye masafa ya IP ya faragha au ya ndani.

ALLOW_API_KEY_REVEAL.description: Ruhusu watumiaji walioidhinishwa wa dashibodi kuonyesha funguo za API zilizohifadhiwa badala ya kuona thamani zilizofichwa pekee.

ENABLE_TLS_FINGERPRINT.description: Wezesha modi ya siri ya alama ya vidole ya TLS.

PROXY_AUTO_SELECT_ENABLED.description: Wakati hakuna proksi iliyokabidhiwa kwenye muunganisho, chagua kiotomatiki proksi ya kwanza ya sajili inayofanya kazi. Imezimwa kwa chaguomsingi kwa sababu vinginevyo proksi moja ya sajili inakuwa mbadala wa kimataifa kwa trafiki yote (#3332).

OMNIROUTE_CONTROL_PLANE_PROXY_DIRECT_FAL.description: Ruhusu mtiririko wa OAuth na uthibitishaji wa mtoa huduma kuruka proksi iliyobandikwa wakati ukaguzi wa ufikiaji wa proksi unapofeli. Imezimwa kwa chaguomsingi kwa sababu hii inaweza kubadilisha IP ya kutoka (egress IP) ya akaunti.

MITM_DISABLE_TLS_VERIFY.description: Zima uthibitishaji wa cheti cha TLS kwa proksi ya MITM.

OMNIROUTE_ALLOW_PRIVATE_PROVIDER_URLS.description: Ruhusu URL za mtoa huduma zinazoelekeza kwenye mitandao ya faragha au ya ndani.

OMNIROUTE_ALLOW_LOCAL_PROVIDER_URLS.description: Ruhusu watoa huduma kwenye localhost, LAN, na masafa ya IP ya faragha. Hii inahitajika kwa mifano ya ndani inayoendana na OpenAI na imewezeshwa kwa chaguomsingi. Endpoint za metadata ya wingu kama vile 169.254.169.254 zinaendelea kuzuiwa.

ENABLE_CC_COMPATIBLE_PROVIDER.description: Wezesha modi ya mtoa huduma anayeendana na Claude Code.

TOOL_POLICY_MODE.description: Weka modi ya utekelezaji wa sera ya matumizi ya zana.

RATE_LIMIT_AUTO_ENABLE.description: Wezesha kiotomatiki kikomo cha kasi kulingana na mifumo ya matumizi.

ALLOW_MULTI_CONNECTIONS_PER_COMPAT_NODE.description: Ruhusu viunganishi vingi kwa kila nodi ya uoanifu.

RESPONSES_PASSTHROUGH_DROP_COMMENTARY.description: Ondoa vipengee vya matokeo ya awamu ya ufafanuzi wa ndani kutoka kwenye utiririshaji wa Responses API kabla ya kuvituma kwa wateja. Zima alama hii ili kupokea ufafanuzi mbichi wa mtoaji.

OMNIROUTE_MCP_ENFORCE_SCOPES.description: Tekeleza vizuizi vya upeo wa ufikiaji wa zana za MCP.

OMNIROUTE_MCP_COMPRESS_DESCRIPTIONS.description: Punguza ukubwa wa maelezo ya zana za MCP ili kupunguza matumizi ya tokeni.

OMNIROUTE_ENABLE_RUNTIME_BACKGROUND_TASK.description: Wezesha usindikaji wa kazi za nyuma wakati wa uendeshaji.

OMNIROUTE_DISABLE_BACKGROUND_SERVICES.description: Zima huduma zote za nyuma, ikiwa ni pamoja na uboreshaji upya wa viwango vya matumizi na ulandanishaji.

OMNIROUTE_RTK_TRUST_PROJECT_FILTERS.description: Amini vichujio vya RTK vya kiwango cha mradi bila uthibitishaji.

OMNIROUTE_ENABLE_LIVE_WS.description: Anzisha seva ya WebSocket ya dashibodi ya wakati halisi wakati wa kuagiza kwenye lango la loopback 20132. Weka alama kuwa 0 au false ili kuizima. Ufichuzi wa LAN pia unahitaji LIVE_WS_HOST=0.0.0.0 na LIVE_WS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.

OMNIROUTE_CODEX_WS_ENABLED.description: Ruhusu Codex kutumia Responses kupitia WebSocket. Wakati imezimwa, Codex inarudi kwenye HTTP Responses.

OMNIROUTE_EMERGENCY_FALLBACK.description: Elekeza maombi yaliyomaliza bajeti kwenye mtoa huduma mbadala wa dharura wa bure na mfano.

STREAM_RECOVERY_ENABLED.description: Jaribu tena kwa uwazi utiririshaji uliokatwa wa SSE wa mtoaji kabla ya baiti zozote za jibu kumfikia mteja.

STREAM_RECOVERY_MIDSTREAM_ENABLED.description: Ruhusu urejeshaji wa utiririshaji kuomba jibu tena na kuliunganisha baada ya baiti kuwa tayari zimeshamfikia mteja.

MODEL_CATALOG_INCLUDE_NAMES.description: Jumuisha sehemu za majina rafiki ya kuonyeshwa kwenye majibu ya /v1/models. Zima hii kwa wateja wanaokubali vitambulisho vya mfano pekee.

MODELS_CATALOG_PREFIX_MODE.description: Dhibiti viambishi awali vya ID ya mfano katika /v1/models: 'dual' hutoa viambishi awali vya 'alias' na 'canonical', 'alias' hutoa viambishi awali vifupi pekee, na 'canonical' hutoa ID kamili za mtoa huduma pekee.

ARENA_ELO_SYNC_ENABLED.description: Landanisha mara kwa mara data ya ELO ya ubao wa wanaoongoza wa Arena AI kwa viwango vya akili ya mfano.

CLI_COMPAT_ALL.description: Wezesha modi ya uoanifu kwa wateja wote wa CLI.

MODEL_ALIAS_COMPAT_ENABLED.description: Wezesha safu ya uoanifu ya jina bandia la mfano.

PRICING_SYNC_ENABLED.description: Landanisha data ya bei kiotomatiki. Kigezo cha mazingira cha PRICING_SYNC_ENABLED lazima pia kiwe true.

OMNIROUTE_AUTO_SYNC_CODEX_PROFILES.description: Baada ya ulandanishaji wa mtoa huduma na mfano, zalisha tena wasifu wa ~/.codex/*.config.toml kutoka kwenye katalogi hai. Hii haibadilishi kamwe usanidi amilifu au wa chaguomsingi wa Codex na imezimwa kwa chaguomsingi.

OMNIROUTE_AUTO_SYNC_CLAUDE_PROFILES.description: Baada ya ulandanishaji wa mtoa huduma na mfano, zalisha tena wasifu wa ~/.claude/profiles/<name>/settings.json kutoka kwenye katalogi hai. Hii haibadilishi kamwe usanidi amilifu au wa chaguomsingi wa Claude na imezimwa kwa chaguomsingi.

OMNIROUTE_DISABLE_LOCAL_HEALTHCHECK.description: Zima endpoint ya ukaguzi wa afya wa mfano wa karibu.

OMNIROUTE_DISABLE_TOKEN_HEALTHCHECK.description: Zima ukaguzi wa afya wa uthibitishaji wa tokeni.

SKILLS_SANDBOX_NETWORK_ENABLED.description: Wezesha ufikiaji wa mtandao kwenye sandbox ya ujuzi.

comboControl.configuredTargetsDescription: Hatua za combo zilizohifadhiwa, zilizoboreshwa kwa data ya afya inayolingana inapopatikana.
comboControl.runtimeConfigDescription: Mipangilio ya juu iliyochaguliwa kwa combo hii.
comboControl.resolvedTargetsDescription: Malengo yaliyosawazishwa baada ya utatuzi wa combo iliyowekwa ndani na vipimo vya kiwango cha lengo.
comboControl.noResolvedTargetHealth: Bado hakuna afya ya lengo iliyotatuliwa.
comboControl.noQuotaSnapshots: Hakuna picha za sasa (snapshots) za quota kwa dirisha hili la combo.
comboControl.recentDecisions: Maamuzi ya hivi karibuni ya uelekezaji
comboControl.recentDecisionsDescription: Kumbukumbu za hivi karibuni za simu za API zilizochujwa kwa jina hili la combo. Fungua Uchambuzi kwa maelezo kamili.
comboControl.noRecentLogs: Hakuna kumbukumbu za hivi karibuni za simu za combo zilizopatikana.

usageLimits.usdUsageQuotaDescription: Huzuia ufunguo huu kwa hitilafu ya 400 ya API baada ya matumizi yake ya ndani ya USD kufikia quota iliyosanidiwa ya kila siku au kila wiki.
usageLimits.quotaWindowDescription: Quota ya kila wiki hufuata kuweka upya kwa kila wiki kwa Claude uliohifadhiwa kwenye kache inapopatikana; vinginevyo inarudi kwenye dirisha la siku 7 linaloendelea. Quota ya kila siku hutumia siku ya kalenda ya Fortaleza.
usageLimits.apiKeyUsdQuota: Quota ya ufunguo wa API ya USD
usageLimits.apiKeyUsdQuotaDescription: Inapowezeshwa, @@om-usage inarudisha quota ya kila siku, quota ya kila wiki, matumizi ya kila siku, na matumizi ya kila wiki katika USD. Ya kila wiki hufuata kuweka upya kwa Claude uliohifadhiwa kwenye kache inapopatikana.
usageLimits.noApiKeyUsage: Hakuna matumizi ya ufunguo wa API katika dirisha hili la mtoa huduma.

freeBudget.title: Bajeti ya tokeni za bure
freeBudget.segmentHint: Kila sehemu = kidimbwi kimoja cha bure · kidimbwi kisichorudiwa (deduped), hesabu ya uaminifu (hakuna viwango vya juu vya kikomo vilivyoongezwa).
freeBudget.boost: Fungua ~{tokens} zaidi/mwezi kwa kuongeza salio la mara moja la $10 OpenRouter (maombi 50 → 1000/siku)
freeBudget.uncapped: Bure kabisa, hakuna kikomo kilichochapishwa (kikomo cha kasi) — ufikiaji halisi, hauhesabiwi katika kichwa cha habari:
freeBudget.tosRestricted: {count, plural, one {modeli # imewekewa alama ya kuzuiliwa na ToS} other {modeli # zimewekewa alama ya kuzuiliwa na ToS}} — uamuzi ni wako

tosTitle.caution: Tahadhari — vipengele vya matumizi ya kibinafsi / proksi

providerHealthAutopilot.title: Autopilot ya Afya ya Mtoa Huduma
providerHealthAutopilot.description: Hutafuta watoa huduma wasio imara, muda wa kupumzika kwa akaunti, hitilafu za kizamani, na masuluhisho salama ya mwongozo.
providerHealthAutopilot.noRecommendations: Hakuna mapendekezo ya afya ya mtoa huduma kwa sasa.
providerHealthAutopilot.providerMetrics: alama {score}% · amilifu {active}/{total} · muda wa kupumzika {cooldown} · modeli zilizofungiwa {lockouts}

issue.circuitOpenTitle: Kivunja mzunguko cha mtoa huduma kiko wazi
issue.circuitOpenRecommendation: Thibitisha urejeshi wa mkondo wa juu (upstream), kisha weka upya kivunja mzunguko cha mtoa huduma au subiri dirisha la kujaribu tena.
issue.circuitRecoveryRecommendation: Ruhusu uchunguzi unaofuata ukamilike au weka upya kivunja mzunguko baada ya uthibitishaji wa mwongozo.
issue.terminalTitle: {label} ina hali ya mwisho ya akaunti
issue.terminalRecommendation: Kagua malipo, thibitisha upya utambulisho, au badilisha kitambulisho kabla ya kukiamilisha tena.
issue.cooldownTitle: {label} iko kwenye muda wa kupumzika wa muda mfupi
issue.cooldownRecommendation: Subiri dirisha la kujaribu tena la mkondo wa juu au futa muda wa kupumzika baada ya kuthibitisha urejeshi.
issue.staleErrorTitle: {label} ina hali ya hitilafu ya kizamani
issue.staleErrorRecommendation: Futa sehemu za hitilafu ya kizamani ili kiunganisho kiweze kustahiki kwa uelekezaji wa kawaida tena.
issue.inactiveRecommendation: Washa tena ikiwa tu hii haikuzimwa kimakusudi.
issue.modelLockoutRecommendation: Tatua hali ya kiunganisho au thibitisha kuwa kiwango cha mgao/upatikanaji wa modeli kimepona kabla ya kufuta kufungiwa.
issue.quotaRecommendation: Kagua matumizi ya mgao na uelekeze trafiki kwenye kiunganisho kingine kizuri ikihitajika.

action.resetProviderBreaker: Weka upya kivunja mzunguko cha mtoa huduma
action.clearConnectionCooldown: Futa muda wa kupumzika wa kiunganisho
action.clearStaleError: Futa hali ya hitilafu ya kizamani

changelogPage.changelogLoadFailed: Imeshindwa kupakia kumbukumbu ya mabadiliko. Tafadhali jaribu tena baadaye.

chaosConfig.pageSubtitle: Endesha modeli nyingi za AI kwa sambamba au kwa ushirikiano kwenye kazi ile ile
chaosConfig.enableChaosDesc: Ruhusu funguo za API ambazo hali ya chaos imewashwa kutumia kipengele hiki
chaosConfig.modeParallelDesc: Modeli zote zinaendeshwa kwa wakati mmoja — matokeo ya haraka zaidi
chaosConfig.modeCollaborativeDesc: Modeli zinaunganisha matokeo — kila moja inaona matokeo yaliyopita
chaosConfig.timeoutDesc: Muda wa juu zaidi kwa kila wito wa modeli (5000-600000ms)
chaosConfig.systemPromptDesc: Maagizo maalum kwa instansi zote za modeli za Chaos Mode
chaosConfig.providerOverridesDesc: Chagua modeli maalum kwa kila mtoa huduma kwa ajili ya Chaos Mode
chaosConfig.configSaved: Usanidi wa Chaos umehifadhiwa kwa mafanikio
chaosConfig.keyPermissionDesc: Ruhusu ufunguo huu wa API kutumia Chaos Mode (utekelezaji sambamba wa modeli nyingi)
chaosConfig.testTask: Andika shairi fupi kuhusu akili mnemba
chaosConfig.systemPromptPlaceholder: Hiari: batilisha prompt ya mfumo ya msingi ya Chaos Mode...
chaosConfig.maxTokensDesc: Kiwango cha juu zaidi cha tokeni kwa kila jibu la modeli. Thamani za juu zaidi zinagharimu zaidi na huchukua muda mrefu.
chaosConfig.providerIdPlaceholder: Kitambulisho cha Mtoa Huduma (andika au chagua)
chaosConfig.noProviderOverrides: Hakuna ubatilishaji — watoa huduma wote wanaofanya kazi watashiriki na modeli zao mbadala
